需要技能：[DECEA3]高级工程 Lv.5[-]

English: This is a very convenient water collection tank. You can fill it with dirty water from any body of water or use it to collect water in an improved dew collector.
Schinese: 这是一个非常方便的集水箱。您可以用任何水体的脏水填充它，或者用它在改进的露水收集器中收集水。

English: A huge bottle of dirty water. Unpack it to get the water.
Schinese: 一大瓶脏水。打开包装即可取出水。

English: A huge bottle of clean water. Unpack it to get the water.
Schinese: 一大瓶干净的水。打开包装即可取出水。

English: A small homemade battery with some charge left from a battery pack. Used to charge [FFB800]Reactor[-] tools.
Schinese: 一块自制的小型电池，电池组中还剩下一些电量。用于给[FFB800]Reactor[-]工具充电。

English: Experimental energy technology. The most powerful and long-lasting energy source. [DECEA3]Iron Man[-] is resting.\n\nUsed to create reactor tools and operate powerful energy sources.
Schinese: 实验能源技术。最强大、最持久的能源。[DECEA3]I钢铁侠[-]正在休息。\n\n用于创建反应堆工具并操作强大的能源。

English: Used to connect and extend wires between electrical components. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel.
Schinese: 用于连接和延长电气元件之间的电线。改进的合金使部件显着减轻并提高了强度。\n\n可使用钢修复。

English: Wire up one of these to trigger events based on the time of day. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Schinese: 连接其中之一以根据一天中的时间触发事件。改进的合金使部件显着减轻并提高了强度。\n\n可使用钢材和电气部件进行修复。

English: Used to trigger electrical events when activated. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Schinese: 用于在激活时触发电气事件。改进的合金使部件显着减轻并提高了强度。\n\n可使用钢材和电气部件进行修复。

English: Used to trigger electrical events when motion is detected. Improved alloys make the component significantly lighter and increase its strength. Improved optics also increase the detection radius and range.\n\nRepairable with steel and electrical parts.
Schinese: 用于在检测到运动时触发电气事件。改进的合金使部件显着减轻并提高了强度。改进的光学器件还增加了检测半径和范围。\n\n可使用钢材和电气部件进行修复。

English: Now that's a real blender. Don't stand next to it, or it's going to splash. The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]60%[-].\n\nRepairable with steel.
Schinese: 现在那是一个真正的搅拌机。不要站在它旁边，否则它会溅水。升级将陷阱的耐用性、伤害和爆炸抗性提高了[DECEA3]60%[-]。\n\n可使用钢修复。

English: It's better to look at it from the side. Turn it on — wait a minute — and see what happens! The upgrade significantly increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]90%[-]. But the energy consumption for this monster is also significant.\n\nRepairable with [E9653B]super-strong alloys[-].
Schinese: 最好从侧面看。打开它——等一下——看看会发生什么！此次升级显着提高了陷阱的耐用性、伤害和抗爆炸能力[DECEA3]90%[-]。但这个怪物的能量消耗也是巨大的。\n\n可使用[E9653B] 超强合金[-]进行修复。

English:
Connect [DECEA3]2[-] or more parts. High voltage supplied through the wires will throw back anyone who touches them. That's for sure — Don't touch! It will kill!
The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]40%[-].

Repairable with electrical parts.
Schinese:
连接[DECEA3]2[-]或更多部件。通过电线提供的高压会将任何接触它们的人击退。这是肯定的——不要碰！会杀人的！
升级将陷阱的耐用性、伤害和防爆性提高了[DECEA3]40%[-]。

可使用电气部件修复。

English:
Connect [DECEA3]2[-] or more parts. Extreme voltage supplied through the wires will not leave a chance for anyone. The main thing is not to accidentally touch it yourself! Zombie barbecue takes on a new meaning.
The upgrade increases the trap's durability, damage, and explosion resistance by [DECEA3]40%[-]. Power consumption is significantly increased.

Repairable with improved electrical parts.
Schinese:
连接[DECEA3]2[-]或更多部件。通过电线提供的极端电压不会给任何人留下机会。最主要的是自己不要不小心碰到！僵尸烧烤有了新的含义。
升级将陷阱的耐用性、伤害和防爆性提高了[DECEA3]40%[-]。功耗显着增加。

可使用改进的电气部件进行修复。

English: A version of the automatic turret adapted for .44 caliber cartridges.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Schinese: 适合 0.44 口径弹药筒的自动炮塔版本。\n\n敌人不会对这次升级感到高兴。

English: A version of the automatic turret adapted for 7.62 mm caliber cartridges.\n\nIt's better not to catch her eye, even from afar.
Schinese: 适用于 7.62 毫米口径弹药筒的自动炮塔版本。\n\n最好不要引起她的注意，即使是远远的。

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for 9 mm ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Schinese: 9毫米弹药自动炮塔的改进版本。所有射击特性均得到改善。\n\n敌人不会对这次升级感到高兴。

English: An experimental version of the 9 mm automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Schinese: 9毫米自动炮塔的实验版本，专门适用于[5AFF75]（贫铀）[-]弹药。所有射击特性均得到显着改善。\n\n最好连看都不看。

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for .44 ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Schinese: 用于.44弹药的自动炮塔的改进版本。所有射击特性均得到改善。\n\n敌人不会对这次升级感到高兴。

English: An experimental version of the .44 Magnum automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Schinese: .44 Magnum 自动炮塔的实验版本，专门适用于[5AFF75]（贫铀）[-]弹药。所有射击特性均得到显着改善。\n\n最好连看都不看。

English: An improved version of the automatic turret for 7.62 mm ammunition. All firing characteristics have been improved.\n\nEnemies won't be happy about this upgrade.
Schinese: 7.62毫米弹药自动炮塔的改进版本。所有射击特性均得到改善。\n\n敌人不会对这次升级感到高兴。

English: An experimental version of the 7.62 mm automatic turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly improved.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Schinese: 7.62毫米自动炮塔的实验版本，专门适用于[5AFF75]（贫铀）[-]弹药。所有射击特性均得到显着改善。\n\n最好连看都不看。

English: An improved version of the shotgun turret. All firing characteristics have been increased.\n\nEnemies aren't exactly happy about these adaptations.
Schinese: 霰弹枪炮塔的改进版本。所有射击特性均已增强。\n\n敌人对这些改编并不满意。

English: An experimental version of the shotgun turret, adapted exclusively for [5AFF75](Depleted Uranium)[-] ammunition. All firing characteristics have been significantly increased.\n\nIt's best not to even look.
Schinese: 霰弹枪炮塔的实验版本，专门适用于[5AFF75]（贫铀）[-]弹药。所有射击特性均得到显着提高。\n\n最好连看都不看。

English: This large, improved forge is a great time saver. Improved tools allow you to smelt large amounts of resources much faster.
Schinese: 这个经过改进的大型锻造厂可以节省大量时间。改进的工具可以让你更快地冶炼大量资源。

English: This is the best place for chemical experiments. Now you can create much more complex substances, and old recipes are created faster.
Schinese: 这里是进行化学实验的最佳场所。现在您可以创建更复杂的物质，并且旧配方的创建速度更快。

English: You can create almost anything on a regular workbench, but it takes time. The improved version of the workbench allows you to use modifications that speed up item creation and allow you to create complex and unique items.
Schinese: 您可以在常规工作台上创建几乎任何东西，但这需要时间。工作台的改进版本允许您使用修改来加速项目创建并允许您创建复杂且独特的项目。

English: A universal workstation for dismantling any equipment. Allows you to dismantle any household or industrial equipment and obtain a large amount of resources, as well as extract rare parts or alloys.
Schinese: 用于拆卸任何设备的通用工作站。可以让你拆卸任何家用或工业设备并获得大量资源，以及提取稀有零件或合金。

English: Forget about cooking over a campfire. Now you can cook real home-cooked food.\nAllows you to use kitchen accessories, that increase cooking speed and reduce the amount of resources required.
Schinese: 忘记在篝火上做饭吧。现在您可以烹饪真正的家常菜了。\n允许您使用厨房配件，提高烹饪速度并减少所需的资源量。

English:
Water will no longer be a problem. The improved dew collector allows you to collect dirty water bottles 30% faster.

When a water filter (modification) is installed, it collects clean water in bottles, significantly increasing the amount of water obtained.

Empty bottles are used as fuel.
Schinese:
水将不再是问题。改进的露水收集器让您收集脏水瓶的速度提高 30%。

安装水过滤器（改进版）后，它会将干净的水收集到瓶子中，从而显着增加获得的水量。

空瓶用作燃料。

English: Now you can build an entire city.\nResource processing speed has been increased, and recipe costs have been reduced.
Schinese: 现在你可以建造一整座城市。\n资源处理速度已提高，配方成本已降低。

English: You can't survive without iron. The autominer allows you to get iron without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 iron (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有铁你就无法生存。自动采矿机可以让您在不浪费时间采矿的情况下获得铁。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。对于每[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将收到 6000 铁（不包括改装）。

English: You can't survive without lead. The autominer allows you to get lead without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 lead (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有铅你就无法生存。自动挖矿机可以让您在不浪费时间挖矿的情况下获得领先优势。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。对于每[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将收到 6000 铅（不包括改装）。

English: You can't survive without coal. The autominer allows you to get coal without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 coal (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有煤炭你就无法生存。自动采矿机让您无需浪费时间采矿即可获得煤炭。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。对于每[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将收到 6000 煤炭（不包括改装）。

English: You can't survive without potassium nitrate. The autominer allows you to get potassium nitrate without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 potassium nitrate (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有硝酸钾你就无法生存。自动采矿机可以让您获得硝酸钾，而无需浪费时间采矿。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。每购买[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将获得 6000 硝酸钾（不包括改装）。

English: You can't survive without oil shale. The autominer allows you to get oil shale without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 6000 oil shale (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有油页岩你就无法生存。自动采矿机可以让您获得油页岩，而无需浪费时间采矿。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。每购买[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将获得 6000 油页岩（不包括改装）。

English: You can't survive without clay. The autominer allows you to get clay without wasting time mining. Just fill it up and wait a bit. It uses gasoline canisters. For every [DECEA3]1000[-] gasoline, you will receive 12000 clay (excluding modifications).
Schinese: 没有粘土你就无法生存。自动采矿机可以让您获得粘土，而无需浪费时间采矿。只需填满并稍等一下即可。它使用汽油罐。对于每[DECEA3]1000[-]汽油，您将收到 12000 粘土（不包括改装）。

English: An experimental station for charging portable reactors.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Schinese: 为便携式反应堆充电的实验站。\n\n[FF6666]注意！需要连接电网进行充电。[-]

English: An experimental station for charging reactor augers.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Schinese: 用于给反应器螺旋输送器装料的实验站。\n\n[FF6666]注意！需要连接电网进行充电。[-]

English: An experimental station for charging reactor Impact Drivers.\n\n[FF6666]ATTENTION! Requires connection to the power grid for charging.[-]
Schinese: 充电反应堆冲击驱动器实验站。\n\n[FF6666]注意！需要连接电网进行充电。[-]

English: An experimental power supply that reveals all the advantages of reactor energy. Uses portable [FFB800]reactors[-] as a power source.
Schinese: 揭示反应堆能源所有优点的实验电源。使用便携式[FFB800]reactors[-]作为电源。

English: A huge industrial engine used in industrial equipment and power engineering.
Schinese: 用于工业设备和动力工程的巨大工业发动机。

English:
This is the power of production. All large factories use such generators so that production does not stop, even when there is no access to the external power grid.

The fuel tank capacity and the amount of energy generated are significantly increased.

Industrial engines are used for operation.
Schinese:
这就是生产的力量。所有大型工厂都使用这种发电机，即使没有外部电网，生产也不会停止。

油箱容量和产生的能量显着增加。

使用工业发动机进行操作。

English: An intricate design for creating gunpowder. Significantly speeds up the creation of gunpowder bundles in the improved chemical station.
Schinese: 用于制造火药的复杂设计。改进后的化学站显着加快了火药束的制造速度。

English: A large barrel for compost processing. Necessary to unlock crafting in the improved chemical station.
Schinese: 用于堆肥处理的大桶。需要在改进的化学站中解锁工艺。

English: A set of chemical flasks for a real chemist. Necessary to unlock crafting in the improved chemical station.
Schinese: 一套适合真正化学家的化学烧瓶。需要在改进的化学站中解锁工艺。

English: A complete set of spare parts for mining in the autominer. Increases mining speed by [DECEA3]2 times[-].
Schinese: 用于自动采矿机采矿的全套备件。将挖矿速度提高[DECEA3]2 倍[-]。

English: The packer allows you to quickly gather resources while mining in the autominer. It doubles the amount of resources mined.
Schinese: 加壳器可以让您在自动挖矿机中挖矿时快速收集资源。它使开采的资源量翻倍。

English: When activated, it emits a sound that repels uninvited guests. Also repels construction workers.
Schinese: 当它被激活时，它会发出一种声音来驱逐不速之客。也排斥建筑工人。

English: Blacksmith's bellows for the improved forge. Increases smelting speed by [DECEA3]75%[-].
Schinese: 用于改进锻造的铁匠风箱。冶炼速度提高[DECEA3]75%[-]。

English: Anvil for the improved forge. Increases crafting speed by [DECEA3]75%[-].
Schinese: 用于改进锻造的砧座。将制作速度提高 [DECEA3]75%[-]。

English: This is a compact stack of bullet casings. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Schinese: 这是一叠紧凑的子弹壳。使用此物品打开并拆开包装。

English: This is a compact stack of shotgun buckshot. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Schinese: 这是一叠紧凑的霰弹枪铅弹。使用此物品打开并拆开包装。

English: This is a compact stack of bullet tips. Use this item to open and unpack it.
Schinese: 这是一叠紧凑的项目符号提示。使用此物品打开并拆开包装。

English: A Bundle of resources obtained from recycling small household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 1 to create.[-]
Schinese: 通过回收小家电获得的一堆资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 1 才能创建。[-]

English: A set of resources obtained from processing small units. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 1 to create.[-]
Schinese: 通过处理小单位获得的一组资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 1 才能创建。[-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained from recycling medium household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 3 to create.[-]
Schinese: 从回收中型家用电器中获得的一组资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 3 才能创建。[-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained by recycling medium mechanical items. Use to unpack it.[DECEA3]\n\nRequires Scavenging skill level 3 to craft.[-]
Schinese: 通过回收中型机械物品获得的资源包。用于打开包装。[DECEA3]\n\n需要拾荒技能等级 3 才能制作。[-]

English: A Bundle of resources obtained by recycling medium mechanical items. Use to unpack it.[DECEA3]\n\nRequires Scavenging skill level 3 to craft.[-]
Schinese: 通过回收中型机械物品获得的资源包。用于打开包装。[DECEA3]\n\n需要拾荒技能等级 3 才能制作。[-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from recycling large household appliances. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Schinese: 回收大型家用电器获得的一捆资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 5 才能创建。[-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from recycling broken cars. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Schinese: 通过回收破损汽车获得的一堆资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 5 才能创建。[-]

English: A bundle of resources obtained from processing large units. Use it to unpack it.\n\n[DECEA3]Requires «Salvage Operations» skill level 5 to create.[-]
Schinese: 通过处理大型单位获得的一组资源。用它来打开包装。\n\n[DECEA3]需要“救助操作”技能级别 5 才能创建。[-]

English: It's good to have bolts and screws on hand. This saves a lot of time. Increases item creation speed by [DECEA3]30%[-].
Schinese: 手边最好有螺栓和螺钉。这节省了大量时间。将物品创建速度提高[DECEA3]30%[-]。

English: A good tool is the main thing you need to create complex recipes. Now you can create rare and unique items.
Schinese: 一个好的工具是创建复杂食谱所需的主要东西。现在您可以创造稀有且独特的物品。

English: With these tools, you can stock up on food for [DECEA3]100[-] years ahead. Allows you to create preservatives.
Schinese: 有了这些工具，您可以储备未来[DECEA3]100[-]几年的食物。允许您创建防腐剂。

English: Good sharp knives are always useful in the kitchen, especially if they were sharpened by [FFB800]Ururu[-]. They help you avoid cut fingers and reduce cooking time.
Schinese: 好的锋利的刀在厨房里总是有用的，特别是如果它们是用[FFB800]Ururu[-]磨的。它们可以帮助您避免割伤手指并减少烹饪时间。

English: A compact pack of concrete. Requires fewer resources when crafting.\nOpen this pack to get [DECEA3]1000[-] concrete.
Schinese: 紧凑的混凝土包。制作时需要更少的资源。\n打开此包即可获得[DECEA3]1000[-]具体内容。

English: Specialized components and tools for creating next-generation armor. They enhance armor stats.\n\n[DECEA3]Used to craft experimental and improved armor.[-]
Schinese: 用于制造下一代装甲的专用组件和工具。它们增强护甲统计数据。\n\n[DECEA3]U用于制作实验性和改进型装甲。[-]

English: You are affected by the Rescuer armor bonus.
Schinese: 你会受到救援者护甲加成的影响。

English:
You have equipped a full set of experimental [FFB800]Rescuer[-] armor.
Your party members benefit from the following bonuses: food and water consumption decreased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodWaterFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], carrying capacity increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerCarryCapacityFSBDisplay:0)}[-], health regeneration from healing increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRegHealthFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], more food and medicine in loot by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodLootFSBDisplay:0)}%[-], and running speed increased by [DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRunSpeedFSBDisplay:0)}%[-].

[FFB800]Party support[-] - Using [8692FF]super elixirs[-] and [8692FF]Rescuer's first aid kit[-] will apply the effect to all party members. When using the [8692FF]Rescuer's first aid kit[-], you apply the [FFB800]Rescuer's defense[-] effect to an ally.

[DECEA3]Grants resistance to 1 active radiation effect.[-]
Schinese:
您已装备了全套实验性[FFB800]Rescuer[-]装甲。
您的队伍成员受益于以下奖励：食物和水消耗减少[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodWaterFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，承载能力增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerCarryCapacityFSBDisplay:0)}[-]，治疗恢复健康恢复增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRegHealthFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，战利品中的食物和药品增加[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerFoodLootFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]，运行速度提高了[DECEA3]{cvar(.armorRescuerRunSpeedFSBDisplay:0)}%[-]。

[FFB800]队伍支持[-] - 使用[8692FF]超级灵药[-]和[8692FF]救援者的急救箱[-]会将效果应用于所有队伍成员。当使用[8692FF]Rescuer 的急救箱[-]时，您将[FFB800]Rescuer 的防御[-]效果应用于盟友。

Schinese: 在有关攻击性武器的杂志中，您可以找到有关人们如何独立改进工厂武器的小文章。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够改进机枪或创建实验模型。

English: In magazines about shotguns, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve shotguns or create experimental models.
Schinese: 在有关霰弹枪的杂志中，您可以找到有关人们如何独立改进工厂武器的小文章。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您可以改进霰弹枪或创建实验模型。

English: In magazines about the world of rifles, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve sniper rifles or create experimental models.
Schinese: 在有关步枪世界的杂志中，您可以找到有关人们如何独立改进工厂武器的小文章。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您可以改进狙击步枪或创建实验模型。

English: In magazines about hand weapons, you can find small articles on how people independently improve factory models of weapons.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve automatic pistols or create experimental models.
Schinese: 在有关手持武器的杂志中，您可以找到有关人们如何独立改进武器工厂模型的小文章。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您可以改进自动手枪或创建实验模型。

English: In archery enthusiasts' magazines, you can find small articles on how people improve their weapons on their own.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you can improve your bow and crossbow, or create experimental models.
Schinese: 在射箭爱好者的杂志中，您可以找到有关人们如何自行改进武器的小文章。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您可以改进您的弓和弩，或创建实验模型。

English: You have learned how to create any workstations. But there are articles from experts that tell how to improve them.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve your stations and create useful tools for them.
Schinese: 您已经学习了如何创建任何工作站。但有一些专家的文章讲述了如何改进它们。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够改进您的站点并为其创建有用的工具。

English:
Learning how to create tools is not that difficult. It is difficult to understand how to improve them. Some magazines have articles on how to do this.

Having collected enough articles, you will be able to improve your tools and create experimental ones.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Schinese:
学习如何创建工具并不那么困难。很难理解如何改进它们。一些杂志有关于如何执行此操作的文章。

收集了足够的文章后，您将能够改进您的工具并创建实验性工具。

[DECEA3]需要高级工程 Lv.5[-]

English: Learn how to create professional construction tools. You will also learn how to create decorative elements of any complexity.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to add unique design to your buildings.
Schinese: 了解如何创建专业的施工工具。您还将学习如何创建任何复杂的装饰元素。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够为您的建筑物添加独特的设计。

English:
Professional electricians sometimes leave notes on how to create complex mechanisms with your own hands. There are also notes on experimental energy sources.

Having collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create complex electrical devices and energy sources.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Schinese:
专业电工有时会留下关于如何用自己的双手创建复杂机构的注释。还有关于实验能源的注释。

收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够创建复杂的电气设备和能源。

[DECEA3]需要高级工程 Lv.5[-]

English:
Professional hunters sometimes leave notes on how to create complex traps with your own hands.

Once you have collected enough articles, you will be able to create complex traps that can hold back any horde.

[DECEA3]Requires Advanced Engineering Lv.5[-]
Schinese:
专业猎人有时会留下关于如何亲手制作复杂陷阱的笔记。

一旦您收集了足够的物品，您将能够创建可以阻止任何部落的复杂陷阱。

[DECEA3]需要高级工程 Lv.5[-]

English: It is not so easy to create a strong weapon for close combat, especially for heavy types. Only a few know the secrets of creating a truly powerful weapon. You can find notes about this in magazines.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve sledgehammers, clubs and spears, or create legendary ones.
Schinese: 打造一把强大的近战武器，尤其是重型武器，并不是那么容易的事情。只有少数人知道制造真正强大武器的秘密。您可以在杂志中找到有关此的注释。\n\n收集了足够数量的物品后，您将能够改进大锤、棍棒和长矛，或者创造传奇的物品。

English: A weapon for killing zombies should not only be light, but also convenient. How to make knives and brass knuckles with maximum balance is sometimes written in thematic magazines. And if you add a little electricity... Try it, and the result will definitely please you. You can find notes about this in magazines.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to improve brass knuckles, machetes and a stun baton, or create legendary ones.
Schinese: 杀死僵尸的武器不仅要轻便，而且要方便。有时，主题杂志上会写到如何以最大平衡制作刀具和指节铜套。如果你加一点电......尝试一下，结果一定会让你满意。您可以在杂志中找到有关此的注释。\n\n收集了足够数量的物品后，您将能够改进指节铜套、砍刀和电击棒，或者创造传奇的物品。

English: How difficult it is when you need to eat and drink a lot of tasty things for one task. And you also need to understand how long it will work. In books about food, you can learn how to create food sets.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create new elixirs.
Schinese: 当你为了一项任务需要吃喝很多美味的东西时，这是多么困难啊。而且您还需要了解它可以工作多长时间。在有关食物的书籍中，您可以学习如何创建食物套装。\n\n收集足够数量的物品后，您将能够创建新的灵丹妙药。

English: Not all drugs can cure — some can even kill. In medical journals, you can often find articles about what can and cannot be mixed with what. A huge field for experiments.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create new experimental drugs.
Schinese: 并非所有药物都能治愈——有些药物甚至可以致命。在医学期刊中，您经常可以找到有关什么可以和什么不能混合的文章。一个巨大的实验领域。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够创建新的实验药物。

English:
A good farmer can grow crops in any weather. A master farmer can create new varieties of crops that are not affected by any weather. In books on farming, you can learn how to conduct plant selection and get the perfect variety.

Having collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to conduct regular and advanced selection at the farmer's station.

[DECEA3]Unlocks with the Farming and Agriculture skill level 3[-]
Schinese:
一个好的农民可以在任何天气下种植庄稼。农民大师可以创造出不受任何天气影响的农作物新品种。在农业书籍中，您可以学习如何进行植物选择并获得完美的品种。

收集到足够数量的物品后，您就可以在农户站进行定期和高级筛选。

[DECEA3]以农耕和农业技能等级 3[-]解锁

English: Good armor is the key to long-term survival. In books about ammunition, you can learn how to create sets of experimental armor, as well as how to create new, more advanced modifications.\n\nHaving collected a sufficient number of articles, you will be able to create experimental armor and improved modifications.
Schinese: 好的盔甲是长期生存的关键。在有关弹药的书籍中，您可以学习如何创建实验装甲组，以及如何创建新的、更高级的修改。\n\n收集了足够数量的文章后，您将能够创建实验性装甲和改进的修改。

English: Experienced mechanics know how to turn any tin can into a real beast. In books for auto mechanics, you can learn how to create advanced modifications.\n\nHaving collected enough articles, you will be able to create advanced modifications for your vehicle.
Schinese: 经验丰富的机械师知道如何将任何锡罐变成真正的野兽。在汽车机械师书籍中，您可以学习如何创建高级修改。\n\n收集了足够的文章后，您将能够为您的车辆创建高级修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Explosives Lv.100[-] allows you to craft [DECEA3]Master Demolitionist[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new types of explosives and an advanced grenade launcher.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]炸药 Lv.100[-]允许您制作[DECEA3]爆破大师[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志可以解锁新型炸药和先进的榴弹发射器。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Machine Guns Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Machine Gun Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare machine guns, and modifications for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]机枪Lv.100[-]可以让您制作[DECEA3]机枪大师[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够改进或创造独特且稀有的机枪，并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Shotguns Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Shotgun Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare shotguns, and modifications for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Shotguns Lv.100[-]可让您制作[DECEA3]Shotgun Master[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够改进或创造独特且稀有的霰弹枪，并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Rifles Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Rifle Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare rifles, and modifications for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Rifles Lv.100[-]允许您制作[DECEA3]Rifle Master[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够改进或创造独特且稀有的步枪，并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Pistols Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Hand Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create unique and rare pistols, and modifications for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]手枪 Lv.100[-]允许您制作[DECEA3]手持武器大师[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够改进或创造独特且稀有的手枪，并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Bows Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Archery Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create rare bows and crossbows.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Bows Lv.75[-]可让您制作[DECEA3]Archery Master[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够升级或制造稀有的弓和弩。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Robotics Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Robotics Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade your robotic hammer and automated turrets, as well as create modifications for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Robotics Lv.100[-]可让您制作[DECEA3]Robotics Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够升级您的机器人锤和自动炮塔，并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Workstations Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Workstations Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new stations and tools for them.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Workstations Lv.75[-]允许您制作[DECEA3]Workstations Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志可以为他们解锁新的站点和工具。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Mining Tools Lv.100[-] or [DECEA3]Refining Tools Lv.75[-] will allow you to create [DECEA3]Tools Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to improve or create rare tools and modifications for them.
Schinese: 任何制作技能[DECEA3]采矿工具Lv.100[-]或[DECEA3]精炼工具Lv.75[-]都可以让您创建[DECEA3]Tools Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够改进或创建罕见的工具并对其进行修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Repair Tools Lv.50[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Building Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines unlocks new decorative elements.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]维修工具Lv.50[-]允许您创建[DECEA3]建筑大师[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志可以解锁新的装饰元素。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Electrician Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Electrician Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new items.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]电工Lv.100[-]可以让你制作[DECEA3]电工大师[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够创造新的物品。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Traps Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Traps Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new traps.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Traps Lv.75[-]可让您制作[DECEA3]Traps Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够创造新的陷阱。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Vehicles Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master Mechanic[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new modifications for your vehicle.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]车辆Lv.100[-]可以让你制作[DECEA3]机械大师[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够对您的车辆进行新的修改。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Clubs Lv.75[-], [DECEA3]Sledgehammers Lv.75[-] or [DECEA3]Spears Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Heavy Melee Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create unique and rare heavy melee weapons and modifications for them.
Schinese: 任何制作技能[DECEA3]Clubs Lv.75[-]、[DECEA3]Sledgehammers Lv.75[-]或[DECEA3]Spears Lv.75[-]都可以让您制作[DECEA3]重型近战武器大师[-]弹匣。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够升级或创建独特且罕见的重型近战武器并对其进行修改。

English: Any of the crafting skills [DECEA3]Blades Lv.75[-] or [DECEA3]Knuckles Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master of Light Melee Weapons[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to upgrade or create unique and rare light melee weapons and modifications for them.
Schinese: 任何制作技能[DECEA3]Blades Lv.75[-]或[DECEA3]Knuckles Lv.75[-]都可以让您制作[DECEA3]轻型近战武器大师[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够升级或创建独特且罕见的轻型近战武器及其修改。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Food Lv.100[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Kitchen Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new elixirs, as well as prepare complex meals and baked goods in the stove.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Food Lv.100[-]可让您制作[DECEA3]Kitchen Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够创造新的灵丹妙药，以及在炉子中准备复杂的膳食和烘焙食品。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Medicines Lv.75[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Master Chemist[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to create new chemicals.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Medicines Lv.75[-]可以让您制作[DECEA3]Master Chemist[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够创造新的化学品。

English: Crafting skill [DECEA3]Seeds Lv.50[-] allows you to create [DECEA3]Farmer Master[-] magazines.\nReading these magazines will allow you to conduct plant selection at the farmer's station.
Schinese: 制作技能[DECEA3]Seeds Lv.50[-]允许您制作[DECEA3]Farmer Master[-]杂志。\n阅读这些杂志将使您能够在农民站进行植物选择。

English: Your passive skill Second Wind has been activated
Schinese: 你的被动技能“重生之风”已激活

English: Your passive skill Second Wind has activated. You restored 500 stamina. The ability is now recharging.
Schinese: 你的被动技能“重生之风”已激活。你恢复了 500 点体力。该能力现在正在充电。

English: Your passive skill Irradiated has been activated
Schinese: 你的被动技能“辐射”已激活

English: Your passive skill Irradiated has activated. Irradiation has been reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-]. The ability is now recharging.
Schinese: 你的被动技能“辐射”已激活。辐照度已降低[DECEA3]25%[-]。该能力现在正在充电。

English: Your passive skill Pure Adrenaline has been activated
Schinese: 你的被动技能“纯粹肾上腺素”已激活

English: Your passive skill Pure Adrenaline has activated. You restored 150 health. The ability is now recharging.
Schinese: 你的被动技能“纯粹肾上腺素”已激活。你恢复了 150 点生命值。该能力现在正在充电。

English: While this ability is active, each hit you take increases your melee damage by [DECEA3]10%[-], up to a maximum of [DECEA3]50%[-].
Schinese: 当此能力处于活动状态时，你受到的每次攻击都会使你的近战伤害增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，最高可达[DECEA3]50%[-]。

English:
[DECEA3]WASTELAND BONUSES:[-]
Experience gained in the wasteland increased by [DECEA3]10%[-], Lead production increased by [DECEA3]50%[-], Damage to all zombies increased by [DECEA3]30%[-], Damage to bosses increased by [DECEA3]15%[-], Damage to minibosses increased by [DECEA3]30%[-], Resistance to radiation damage increased by [DECEA3]30%[-]

[DECEA3]BONUS ABILITY (EVERYWHERE)[-] [FFB800]IRRADIATED[-]
Grants resistance to 1 radiation effect. If the personnels exposure exceeds [DECEA3]85%[-], it resets to [DECEA3]25%[-]. Cooldown: 5 minutes.
Schinese:
[DECEA3]荒地奖励：[-]
在荒地获得的经验增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，铅产量增加[DECEA3]50%[-]，对所有僵尸的伤害增加[DECEA3]30%[-]，对boss的伤害增加[DECEA3]15%[-]，对小boss的伤害增加[DECEA3]30%[-]，对辐射伤害的抵抗力增加[DECEA3]30%[-]

[DECEA3]额外能力（无处不在）[-] [FFB800]IRRADIATED[-]
赋予对1种辐射效应的抵抗力。如果人员暴露超过[DECEA3]85%[-]，则重置为[DECEA3]25%[-]。冷却时间：5 分钟。

English: By collecting enough notes, you can get an additional skill point.
Schinese: 通过收集足够的笔记，你可以获得额外的技能点。

English: When you read it, you will receive [DECEA3]1[-] skill point.
Schinese: 阅读后，您将获得[DECEA3]1[-]技能点。
该捆绑包包含[DECEA3]5[-]技能日志
该捆绑包包含[DECEA3]25[-]技能日志

English: You have a good teacher next to you.\nAll experience gained is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-].
Schinese: 你身边有一位好老师。\n所有获得的经验都会增加[DECEA3]5%[-]。

English: Advanced character skill development. Traders recognize you, and you receive bonuses to buying and selling prices.
Schinese: 高级角色技能发展。交易者认可您，并且您会获得买入和卖出价格的奖金。

English: No skill points are required here. The character's personal traits are formed after reading the book Personal Traits.\nYou can improve positive traits or rid the character of negative ones during the game by fulfilling each trait's conditions.
Schinese: 这里不需要技能点。人物的个人特质是在阅读《个人特质》一书后形成的。\n您可以在游戏过程中通过满足每个特征的条件来改善积极特征或消除角色的消极特征。

English: You are still far from perfect, but everything is in your hands. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]0.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]2%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你还远未达到完美，但一切都在你的手中。商家购买价格降低了[DECEA3]0.5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]2%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You are no longer just meat - you are running. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]1%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]4%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你不再只是肉——你在奔跑。商家的购买价格降低了[DECEA3]1%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]4%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You have seen the world and have some experience in survival. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]1.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]6%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你见过世面，也有一些生存的经验。商家购买价格降低了[DECEA3]1.5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]6%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You've mastered the basics perfectly; now it's time to delve into the details. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]2%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]8%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 您已经完美掌握了基础知识；现在是时候深入研究细节了。商家的进货价格降低了[DECEA3]2%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]8%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: Other survivors have heard about you, and not necessarily only good things. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]2.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 其他幸存者都听说过你，而且不一定只是好事。商家购买价格降低了[DECEA3]2.5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]10%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You have excellent fighting skills - all that remains is to put them into practice. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]3%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]12%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你拥有出色的战斗技巧 - 剩下的就是将它们付诸实践。商家的进货价格降低了[DECEA3]3%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]12%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You've seen a lot. But don't stop there. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]3.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]14%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你已经看过很多了。但不要就此止步。商家的进货价格降低了[DECEA3]3.5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]14%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You can't be ignored. You're right there in every mess. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]4%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]16%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 你不能被忽视。在每一个混乱中你都在那里。商家购买价格降低了[DECEA3]4%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]16%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: People talk about you with admiration. You are perfect in almost everything. In almost everything. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]4.5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]18%[-]. Explore the world and become the king of the wasteland.
Schinese: 人们谈论你时都充满钦佩。你几乎在所有事情上都是完美的。几乎在所有事情上。商家购买价格降低了[DECEA3]4.5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]18%[-]。探索世界，成为废土之王。

English: You are the king of the entire wasteland. There is nothing that will surprise or frighten you. Purchase prices from merchants have been reduced by [DECEA3]5%[-], and sale prices have been increased by [DECEA3]20%[-]. You are perfect!
Schinese: 你是整个废土的王。没有什么会让你感到惊讶或害怕。商家的进货价格降低了[DECEA3]5%[-]，销售价格提高了[DECEA3]20%[-]。你很完美！

English: You also need to be able to learn. Developing the skill of learning will allow you to learn faster, and when you master the skills, you will be able to teach others.
Schinese: 您还需要能够学习。培养学习技能可以让你学得更快，当你掌握了这些技能后，你就可以教别人了。

English: Everything is like in school. Only zombies interfere with homework. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]2.5%[-]
Schinese: 一切都像在学校一样。只有僵尸会干扰家庭作业。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]2.5%[-]

English: Ah, student life. Classes, library, parties, girls... and zombies. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Schinese: 啊，学生生活。班级、图书馆、派对、女孩……还有僵尸。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: If it weren't for the apocalypse, you would have become a good engineer. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]7.5%[-]
Schinese: 如果没有世界末日，你会成为一名优秀的工程师。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]7.5%[-]

English: You don't have to read a lot to survive the apocalypse. You can, for example, shoot a lot. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Schinese: 你不必读太多书就能在末世中生存。例如，你可以拍摄很多次。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]10%[-]

English: Not everyone likes smart guys, but you don't care. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]12.5%[-]
Schinese: 不是每个人都喜欢聪明人，但你不在乎。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]12.5%[-]

English: Learned it yourself - teach others. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]15%[-]
Schinese: 自己学会了-教别人。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]15%[-]

English: In laboratories, knowledge is obtained faster. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]17.5%[-]
Schinese: 在实验室中，知识的获取速度更快。您的经验增益增加[DECEA3]17.5%[-]

English: Lover of studying everything thoroughly. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]20%[-]
Schinese: 热爱研究一切事物。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]20%[-]

English: Smarter than [DECEA3]99%[-]... Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]22.5%[-]
Schinese: 比[DECEA3]99%[-]更聪明...您的经验增益增加[DECEA3]22.5%[-]

English: Learned it yourself - teach others. Allies and party members receive [DECEA3]5%[-] more experience. Your experience gain is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]
Schinese: 自己学会了-教别人。盟友和党员获得[DECEA3]5%[-]更多经验。您的经验获得量增加[DECEA3]25%[-]

English: To find good loot, you need to understand where and why it was hidden. Master the skill of finding rare loot and you will always have something to offer for sale.
Schinese: 要找到好的战利品，您需要了解它被隐藏的地点和原因。掌握寻找稀有战利品的技能，你将永远有东西可以出售。

English: Look more carefully. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]1.5%[-]
Schinese: 仔细看看。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]1.5%[-]

English: Collect only the most important. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]3%[-]
Schinese: 只收集最重要的。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]3%[-]

English: Your trained eye won't miss anything. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]4.5%[-]
Schinese: 你训练有素的眼睛不会错过任何东西。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]4.5%[-]

English: A good thief always knows where to look... Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]6%[-]
Schinese: 一个好的小偷总是知道去哪里寻找...战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]6%[-]

English: If you can't find anything, you can just take it away. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]7.5%[-]
Schinese: 如果你找不到任何东西，你可以把它拿走。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]7.5%[-]

English: Without good loot you won't rest. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]9%[-]
Schinese: 没有好的战利品你就不会休息。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]9%[-]

English: Rob, rob, rob... Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]10.5%[-]
Schinese: 抢，抢，抢……战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]10.5%[-]

English: The experienced thief knows how to get away with it. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]12%[-]
Schinese: 有经验的小偷知道如何逃脱。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]12%[-]

English: Searching for good loot is your main profession. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]13.5%[-]
Schinese: 寻找好战利品是你的主要职业。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]13.5%[-]

English: It is impossible to hide anything from you. Loot search bonus is increased by [DECEA3]15%[-]
Schinese: 对你隐瞒任何事情都是不可能的。战利品搜索奖励增加[DECEA3]15%[-]

English: It takes a lot of effort to kill a big beast. Become an expert at killing them and do it much faster.
Schinese: 想要杀死一头巨兽，需要花费很大的力气。成为杀死它们的专家并且做得更快。

English: These running creatures can be quickly calmed down if you know how. Damage to feral zombies increased by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Schinese: 如果你知道如何做的话，这些奔跑的生物就能很快平静下来。对野生僵尸的伤害增加[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: You understand the weak points of irradiated zombies very well. Damage to feral zombies increased by [DECEA3]10%[-], and to irradiated ones by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Schinese: 你非常了解受辐射僵尸的弱点。对野生僵尸的伤害增加[DECEA3]10%[-]，对受辐射僵尸的伤害增加[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: These creatures are extremely fast and dangerous, but not for you. Damage to feral zombies increased by [DECEA3]15%[-], to irradiated by [DECEA3]10%[-], to charged by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Schinese: 这些生物速度极快且危险，但不适合你。对野生僵尸的伤害增加[DECEA3]15%[-]，受到[DECEA3]10%[-]照射，受到[DECEA3]5%[-]充电

English: These are truly the spawn of hell, it's time to send them back. Damage to feral zombies increased by [DECEA3]20%[-], to irradiated by [DECEA3]15%[-], to charged by [DECEA3]10%[-], to hellish by [DECEA3]5%[-]

English: Skills in organizing corporate events and other activities can be useful even after a nuclear explosion. With this experience, any expedition can proceed more quickly and the chances of its success increase.
Schinese: 即使在核爆炸之后，组织公司活动和其他活动的技能也很有用。有了这些经验，任何探险都可以更快地进行，成功的机会也会增加。

English: Attention to detail in expedition organization pays off. Expedition duration is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-], and the chance of successful completion is increased by [DECEA3]4%[-].
Schinese: 探险组织中对细节的关注是有回报的。探险持续时间减少[DECEA3]10%[-]，成功完成的几率增加[DECEA3]4%[-]。

English: Good organization means good results. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]8%[-].
Schinese: 良好的组织意味着良好的结果。远征持续时间减少了[DECEA3]20%[-]，成功完成的几率增加了[DECEA3]8%[-]。

English: Selecting participants is the foundation for a successful expedition. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]30%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]12%[-].
Schinese: 选择参与者是一次成功探险的基础。远征持续时间减少了[DECEA3]30%[-]，成功完成的几率增加了[DECEA3]12%[-]。

English: Understanding all aspects of preparing and executing even the most complex expeditions leaves virtually no chance of mission failure. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]40%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]16%[-].
Schinese: 即使是最复杂的探险，了解准备和执行的各个方面也几乎不会导致任务失败。远征持续时间减少了[DECEA3]40%[-]，成功完成的几率增加了[DECEA3]16%[-]。

English: Better preparation is simply impossible. Now everything depends on the best team. Expedition duration has been reduced by [DECEA3]50%[-], and the chance of successful completion has been increased by [DECEA3]20%[-].
Schinese: 更好的准备是根本不可能的。现在一切都取决于最好的团队。远征持续时间减少了[DECEA3]50%[-]，成功完成的几率增加了[DECEA3]20%[-]。

English: If you aggressively seek adventure, it will surely find you. Killing minibosses and bosses can attract new enemies.
Schinese: 如果你积极寻求冒险，它一定会找到你。杀死小首领和首领可以吸引新的敌人。

English: If you find big loot, there may be more nearby. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]8%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]4%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Schinese: 如果你发现大量战利品，附近可能还有更多。杀死一个小 Boss 有[DECEA3]8%[-]的几率吸引一个新的，杀死一个 Boss 有[DECEA3]4%[-]的几率吸引另一个。

English: You know how to throw a party even in a contaminated area. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]16%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]8%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Schinese: 即使在受污染的地区，您也知道如何举办派对。杀死一个小 Boss 有[DECEA3]16%[-]的几率吸引新的，杀死一个 Boss 有[DECEA3]8%[-]的几率吸引另一个。

English: If you use a wounded enemy as bait, you can find more. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]24%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]12%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Schinese: 如果你使用受伤的敌人作为诱饵，你可以找到更多。杀死一个小 Boss 有[DECEA3]24%[-]的机会吸引新的，杀死一个 Boss 有[DECEA3]12%[-]的机会吸引另一个。

English: A walk is much better when there is plenty of prey. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]32%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]16%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Schinese: 当有足够的猎物时，步行会更好。杀死一个小 Boss 有[DECEA3]32%[-]的几率吸引新的，杀死一个 Boss 有[DECEA3]16%[-]的几率吸引另一个。

English: You definitely know how to attract the attention of the whole neighborhood. Killing a miniboss has an [DECEA3]40%[-] chance of attracting a new one, and killing a boss has an [DECEA3]20%[-] chance of attracting another one.
Schinese: 你绝对知道如何吸引整个社区的注意力。杀死一个小老板有[DECEA3]40%[-]的机会吸引新的老板，杀死老板有[DECEA3]20%[-]的机会吸引另一个老板。

Schinese: 此次探险活动圆满结束。这是我们发现的一切。

Schinese: «已经派遣了一支考察队来研究增加的活动。他们回来后我会通知你。现在我们只需要等待。希望他们能找到有价值的东西。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Great news. The expedition was a success, and you can collect your reward.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «好消息。探险成功了，你可以领取奖励了。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: Unfortunately, the news isn't good. The expedition encountered a horde too large. They barely escaped and failed to secure any loot. Let's hope for better luck next time.
Schinese: 不幸的是，消息并不好。探险队遇到了太多的部落。他们勉强逃脱并未能获得任何战利品。让我们期待下次有更好的运气。

English: «An expedition to search for sources of infection has been dispatched. I'll let you know when they return. Now we just have to wait. Let's hope they find something worthwhile.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «已经派出一支搜寻感染源的探险队。他们回来后我会通知你。现在我们只需要等待。希望他们能找到有价值的东西。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Great news. The expedition was a success, and you can collect your reward.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «好消息。探险成功了，你可以领取奖励了。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: Unfortunately, the news isn't good. The expedition discovered an anomalous source of infection. Only two mercenaries survived, and they're still in critical condition. There's no loot to speak of. Let's hope for better luck next time.
Schinese: 不幸的是，消息并不好。探险队发现了异常感染源。只有两名雇佣兵幸存，目前仍处于危急状态。没什么可说的。让我们期待下次有更好的运气。

English: «The expedition to the dead zone has been sent. I'll let you know when they return. Now we just have to wait. Let's hope they find something worthwhile.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «前往死亡地带的探险队已被派遣。他们回来后我会通知你。现在我们只需要等待。希望他们能找到有价值的东西。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Great news. No one believed it, but the guys did the impossible. The expedition was a success, and you can collect your reward.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «好消息。没有人相信这一点，但这些人却做了一件不可能的事。探险成功了，你可以领取奖励了。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: I have some news about your expedition. Stalkers recently found their remains in the wasteland. I don't know exactly what happened to them, but it's not a sight for the faint of heart. They knew what they were getting into, but I don't think that will reassure you, given your investment. Let's hope for better luck next time.
Schinese: 我有一些关于你的探险的消息。潜行者最近在荒地中发现了他们的遗骸。我不知道他们到底发生了什么事，但这不适合胆小的人。他们知道自己将面临什么，但考虑到您的投资，我认为这不会让您放心。让我们期待下次有更好的运气。

English: The expedition has been dispatched. Wait for it to be completed.
Schinese: 探险队已经出动。等待它完成。

Schinese: 收集资源组并在[DECEA3]广播站[-]请求兑换稀有合金。

English: Risking your neck every day has its advantages.\nGain access to better trader items and get [DECEA3]5%[-] more dukes. You can create [DECEA3]Tier 3[-] quests in the Radio Station and equip expeditions to explore the surrounding area.
Schinese: 每天冒着颈部危险也有它的好处。\n获得更好的交易物品并获得[DECEA3]5%[-]更多公爵。您可以在广播电台中创建[DECEA3]Tier 3[-]任务并装备探险队以探索周边地区。

English: The traders know you can get the job done, plunderer.\nGain access to even better trader items and get [DECEA3]10%[-] more dukes. You can create [DECEA3]Tier 4[-] quests in the Radio Station and equip expeditions to search for increased zombie activity.
Schinese: 商人知道你能完成任务，掠夺者。\n获得更好的交易物品并获得[DECEA3]10%[-]更多公爵。您可以在广播电台中创建[DECEA3]Tier 4[-]任务并装备探险队以搜索增加的僵尸活动。

English: You've made a name for yourself as a mercenary for hire.\nGain access to better trader items and get [DECEA3]15%[-] more dukes. You can create [DECEA3]Tier 5[-] quests in the Radio Station and equip expeditions to search for sources of infection.
Schinese: 作为一名雇佣兵，你已经为自己赢得了声誉。\n获得更好的交易物品并获得[DECEA3]15%[-]更多公爵。您可以在广播电台中创建[DECEA3]Tier 5[-]任务并装备探险队来搜索感染源。

English: You are the daring adventurer!\nGain access to better trader items and get [DECEA3]20%[-] more dukes. You can create [DECEA3]Tier 6[-] quests in the Radio Station and equip expeditions to explore the dead zone.
Schinese: 你是勇敢的冒险家！\n获得更好的交易者物品并获得[DECEA3]20%[-]更多公爵。您可以在广播电台创建[DECEA3]Tier 6[-]任务并装备探险队来探索死区。

English: Sometimes survivors leave their notes in the margins of books.\nIf you collect enough, you can launch the event you need from tier [DECEA3]3[-] and above and get a reward for it from any trader.

Light armor does not restrict movement and weighs almost nothing.

Heavy armor makes you much more resistant to damage taken. And in melee combat, you deal enhanced blows.

English:
Light Armor
Birds and wasps are your friends. You can find more honey by cutting down trees.

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.

轻甲

全套奖励：增加木材收成。

全套奖励：增加木材收获。

Light Armor

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.

全套奖励：增加木材收获。

Light Armor

Full Set Bonus: Increases wood harvest.

English: Even with an incomplete Enforcer set, pistols are your best friends.\n\nDamage from SMGs and pistols increased by {cvar(.armorSemiEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使执法者套装不完整，手枪也是您最好的朋友。\n\n冲锋枪和手枪造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Your best friends are pistols.\n\nGunslinger ability damage increased by {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 你最好的朋友是手枪。\n\n枪手技能伤害提高 {cvar(.armorEnforcerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Keep the sun out of your eyes and on the prize. Increases the chance to find seeds in loot.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Schinese:
中型装甲
避免阳光照射到你的眼睛和奖品上。增加在战利品中找到种子的机会。

全套奖励：增加收获额外农作物的机会。

English:
Medium Armor
Farmers recover faster with food because they know how to get it. Increases the recovery of health and stamina from food, as well as your lifting capacity.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Schinese:
中型护甲
农民通过食物恢复得更快，因为他们知道如何获取食物。增加食物对健康和耐力的恢复，以及你的举重能力。

全套奖励：增加收获额外农作物的机会。

English:
Medium Armor
Only a real farmer knows how to harvest quickly. Increases the attack speed of knives and machetes.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Schinese:
中甲
只有真正的农民才知道如何快速收割。提高刀和砍刀的攻击速度。

全套奖励：增加收获额外农作物的机会。

English:
Medium Armor
Nothing beats a comfortable pair of boots out in the field. Adds a chance to gain a seed when harvesting.

Full Set Bonus: Adds a chance to harvest an extra crop.
Schinese:
中型装甲
在野外没有什么比一双舒适的靴子更好的了。收获时增加获得种子的机会。

全套奖励：增加收获额外作物的机会。

English: A real farmer knows how to harvest the crop correctly without damaging it.\n\nMakes it possible to collect an additional {cvar(.armorFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the harvest
Schinese: 真正的农民知道如何正确收割农作物而不损坏农作物。\n\n可以收集额外的 {cvar(.armorFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% 收成

English: Even with an incomplete Farmer's kit, you know how to properly harvest crops without damaging them.\n\nGives you the opportunity to additionally harvest {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% of the crop.
Schinese: 即使农夫工具包不完整，您也知道如何正确收割农作物而不损坏它们。\n\n 让您有机会额外收割 {cvar(.armorSemiFarmerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的农作物。

English:
Medium Armor
You always easily adapt to new areas. Increases all experience gained in desert and winter biomes.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Schinese:
中甲
你总是能轻松适应新领域。增加在沙漠和冬季生物群落中获得的所有经验。

全套奖励：杀死野生动物和辐射僵尸的额外经验。

English:
Medium Armor
You can easily put your face under attack. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Schinese:
中甲
你可以轻松地让你的脸受到攻击。增加生命值。

全套奖励：杀死野生动物和辐射僵尸的额外经验。

English:
Medium Armor
Don't fight back - so what? Increases the attack speed of clubs and sledgehammers.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Schinese:
中型装甲
不反击——那又怎样？提高棍棒和大锤的攻击速度。

全套奖励：杀死野生动物和辐射僵尸的额外经验。

English:
Medium Armor
Without transportation, it's like having no hands. Reduces vehicle fuel consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Additional experience for killing ferals and radiated zombies.
Schinese:
中甲
没有交通工具，就像没有双手一样。减少车辆燃油消耗。

全套奖励：杀死野生动物和辐射僵尸的额外经验。
骑自行车的人半套装奖金活跃

English: Lover of stronger opponents.\n\nExperience for killing ferals and radiated zombies increased by {cvar(.armorBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 喜欢更强大的对手。\n\n杀死野性和辐射僵尸的经验增加 {cvar(.armorBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Biker set, you are a fan of stronger opponents.\n\nExperience for killing wild and infected zombies increased by {cvar(.armorSemiBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使骑手套装不完整，您也会喜欢更强大的对手。\n\n杀死野生和受感染僵尸的经验增加 {cvar(.armorSemiBikerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
You never know what you can do till you try. Increases the salvaging speed, the number of items received, and your carrying capacity.

Full Set Bonus: Find better quality loot.
Schinese:
中型装甲
除非你尝试，否则你永远不知道自己能做什么。提高打捞速度、收到的物品数量以及您的承载能力。

全套奖励：找到质量更好的战利品。
清道夫半套装奖金活跃

English: Even with an incomplete Scavenger set, you have a keen eye for finding valuable resources that would escape the gaze of others.\n\nYou find loot that is {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% higher in quality
Schinese: 即使拥有不完整的清道夫套装，您也能敏锐地寻找能够逃脱他人目光的宝贵资源。\n\n您会发现质量高出 {cvar(.armorSemiScavengerFSBDisplay:0)}% 的战利品

English:
Medium Armor
Rangers are ruthless negotiators, especially while wearing a well crafted hat. Increases bartering.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Schinese:
中甲
游骑兵是无情的谈判者，尤其是戴着精心制作的帽子时。增加易货贸易。

全套奖励：增加造成的所有伤害并提供对 [DECEA3]1[-] 辐射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Nature has taught strength not only of the spirit, but also of the body. Increases the number of health points.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Schinese:
中甲
大自然不仅教会了精神的力量，还教会了身体的力量。增加生命值。

全套奖励：增加造成的所有伤害并提供对 [DECEA3]1[-] 辐射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
These comfortable gloves allow you to quickly handle any weapon. Increases weapon reload speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Schinese:
中型装甲
这些舒适的手套让您可以快速操作任何武器。提高武器装弹速度。

全套奖励：增加造成的所有伤害并提供对 [DECEA3]1[-] 辐射效果的抵抗力

English:
Medium Armor
Endurance is the key to successful survival in the wild. Increases stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all damage dealt and provides resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect
Schinese:
中甲
耐力是野外成功生存的关键。增加耐力。

全套奖励：增加造成的所有伤害并提供对 [DECEA3]1[-] 辐射效果的抵抗力

English:
The ability to survive in any conditions allows you to deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.

All ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Schinese:
在任何条件下生存的能力使您可以在任何天气下使用任何武器造成更大的伤害。

所有远程伤害增加 {cvar(.armorRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
 赋予对一种主动辐射效果的抵抗力。

English: Even with an incomplete Ranger set, you deal increased damage with any weapon and in any weather.\n\nAll ranged damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使使用不完整的游骑兵套装，您在任何天气下使用任何武器都会造成更高的伤害。\n\n所有远程伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRangerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
Hard training and injuries were not in vain. Everything heals on you like it does on a dog.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Schinese:
中甲
苦练和受伤没有白费。一切都会像对待狗一样治愈你。

全套奖励：增加自动武器造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
True commandos endure without flinching. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Schinese:
中型装甲
真正的突击队员坚忍不退。更快的重伤恢复。

全套奖励：增加自动武器造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
A good shooter disassembles and reassembles his weapon with ease, and has perfected the reloading process. Increases the reload speed of automatic weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Schinese:
中型装甲
优秀的射手可以轻松地拆卸和重新组装他的武器，并完善重新装弹过程。提高自动武器的装填速度。

全套奖励：增加自动武器造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
These shoes are suitable for the most challenging obstacle courses. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by automatic weapons.
Schinese:
中型装甲
这些鞋适合最具挑战性的障碍路线。增加安全坠落高度。

全套奖励：增加自动武器造成的伤害。
突击队半套装奖励激活

English: Your weapons are machine guns and submachine guns. You can do wonders with them.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons increased by {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 你的武器是机枪和冲锋枪。你可以用它们创造奇迹。\n\n自动武器造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Commando set, your weapons are machine guns and assault rifles. With them you can work wonders.\n\nDamage dealt by automatic weapons is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使在不完整的突击队套装中，你的武器也是机枪和突击步枪。有了它们，你可以创造奇迹。\n\n自动武器造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiCommandoFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Medium Armor
They'll never see it coming. Deal more damage when sneaking.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Schinese:
中型装甲
他们永远不会看到它的到来。潜行时造成更多伤害。

全套奖励：增加狙击步枪造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
Move unseen, unheard, and unharmed. Increases sneak effectiveness.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Schinese:
中型护甲
移动时看不见、听不见、不受伤害。提高潜行效率。

全套奖励：增加狙击步枪造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silently - but very quickly. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of sniper rifles.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Schinese:
中型装甲
悄无声息——但速度非常快。提高狙击步枪的射速和装弹速度。

全套奖励：增加狙击步枪造成的伤害。

English:
Medium Armor
Silent, but deadly. Sprinting while sneaking makes no extra sound.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage dealt by sniper rifles.
Schinese:
中型装甲
沉默，但致命。潜行时冲刺不会发出额外的声音。

全套奖励：增加狙击步枪造成的伤害。

English: The hidden killer can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles increased by {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 隐藏的杀手可以轻松找到并消灭他的目标。你在这方面无与伦比。\n\n狙击步枪造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete set, the assassin can easily find and eliminate his target. You have no equal in this.\n\nDamage dealt by sniper rifles is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使装备不完整，刺客也可以轻松找到并消灭他的目标。你在这方面无与伦比。\n\n狙击步枪造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiAssassinFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
The main thing when you climb into a mine is to remember the way back. Increases experience gained when mining ore.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Schinese:
重甲
当你爬进矿井时最重要的是记住回来的路。增加开采矿石时获得的经验。

全套奖励：增加开采的矿石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
You can always quickly repair the tool. That is why it does not break down so often.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Schinese:
重甲
你总是可以快速修复工具。这就是为什么它不会经常损坏的原因。

全套奖励：增加开采的矿石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
A chip here, a chip there, and any vein will give in. Increases block damage for mining tools.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Schinese:
重甲
这里有一个缺口，那里有一个缺口，任何矿脉都会屈服。增加采矿工具的方块伤害。

全套奖励：增加开采的矿石量。

English:
Heavy Armor
With such equipment, stones underfoot are not a problem. Reduces stamina consumption when using a pickaxe.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the amount of ore mined.
Schinese:
重甲
有了这样的装备，脚下的石头都不是问题。减少使用镐时的耐力消耗。

全套奖励：增加开采的矿石量。

English: An experienced miner knows how to get a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 有经验的矿工知道如何获得更多的矿石。\n\n开采的矿石量增加了 {cvar(.armorMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Miner set, you know how to mine a little more ore.\n\nThe amount of ore mined has been increased by {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使矿工套装不完整，你也知道如何开采更多矿石。\n\n开采的矿石量增加了 {cvar(.armorSemiMinerFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Guarded against the severe conditions of the wasteland, this headgear enables the Nomad to wander further. Reduces food and water consumption.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage dealt by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Schinese:
重甲
这款头盔可以抵御荒地的恶劣条件，使游牧者能够走得更远。减少食物和水的消耗。

English:
Heavy Armor
Anything can happen on any journey. The main thing is the ability to quickly recover and move on. Faster critical injury recovery.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Schinese:
重甲
任何旅程中任何事情都可能发生。最重要的是能够快速恢复并继续前进。更快的重伤恢复。

全套奖励：增加霰弹枪造成的伤害并抵抗[DECEA3]1[-]辐射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
If you go into a house to spend the night, there is definitely someone there. Increases the rate of fire and reload speed of shotguns.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Schinese:
重甲
如果你进房子过夜，那里肯定有人。提高霰弹枪的射速和装弹速度。

全套奖励：增加霰弹枪造成的伤害并抵抗[DECEA3]1[-]辐射效果。

English:
Heavy Armor
When crawling through the mountains, it is better not to look down. Increases safe fall height.

Full Set Bonus: Increases the damage done by shotguns and gives resistance to [DECEA3]1[-] radiation effect.
Schinese:
重甲
在山中爬行时，最好不要低头。增加安全坠落高度。

全套奖励：增加霰弹枪造成的伤害并抵抗 [DECEA3]1[-] 辐射效应。

English:
This is the best that can be offered to guests outside the tent.

Damage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Grants resistance to one active radiation effect.
Schinese:
这是可以为帐篷外的客人提供的最好的。

霰弹枪造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
 赋予对一种主动辐射效应的抵抗力。

English: Even without a full set, you know what you can offer to guests outside the tent.\n\nDamage dealt by shotguns increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使没有全套，您也知道可以为帐篷外的客人提供什么。\n\n霰弹枪造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNomadFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
You might not be invited on any dates, but you will hone your skills. Increases experience gain.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Schinese:
重甲
你可能不会被邀请参加任何约会，但你会磨练你的技能。增加经验增益。

全套奖励：增加 [DECEA3]《智力》[-] 属性的伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Your lack of fashion sense gives you the ability to focus on your inventions. Adds a chance to gain two crafting skill points when reading magazines.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Schinese:
重甲
你缺乏时尚感，但你却有能力专注于你的发明。阅读杂志时有机会获得两个制作技能点。

全套奖励：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-]属性的伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Protect your delicate hands from the cold and become an intellectual badass. Increases attack speed with intellect-based weapons.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Schinese:
重甲
保护你娇嫩的双手免受寒冷，成为一个知性的坏蛋。提高基于智力的武器的攻击速度。

全套奖励：增加[DECEA3]《智力》[-]属性的伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Those distant school years were not in vain. You definitely learned how to run away. Increases running speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases damage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute.
Schinese:
重甲
那些遥远的学年没有白费。你肯定学会了如何逃跑。提高跑步速度。

全套奖励：增加 [DECEA3]《智力》[-] 属性的伤害。

English: Robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage from the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute increased by {cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 机器人不仅是有价值的皮毛...\n\n[DECEA3]《智力》[-]属性造成的伤害增加{cvar(.armorNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even in an incomplete Nerd set, robots are not only valuable fur...\n\nDamage dealt by the [DECEA3]«Intelligence»[-] attribute is increased by {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使在不完整的书呆子套装中，机器人也不仅仅是有价值的毛皮...\n\n[DECEA3]《智力》[-] 属性造成的伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiNerdFSBDisplay:0)}%

English:
Heavy Armor
Grandma's ointments work wonders. Increases the speed of healing received.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Schinese:
重甲
奶奶的药膏有奇效。提高收到的治疗速度。

全套奖励：增加所有近战伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Oops. I didn’t immediately notice that my arm was broken. Increases the recovery rate of critical wounds.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Schinese:
重甲
哎呀。我没有立即注意到我的手臂骨折了。提高严重伤害的恢复率。

全套奖励：增加所有近战伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Well, come one at a time. There's enough for everyone. Increases melee attack speed.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Schinese:
重甲
好吧，一次来一个。每个人都足够了。提高近战攻击速度。

全套奖励：增加所有近战伤害。

English:
Heavy Armor
Step right, step left. You easily dodge enemy attacks and spend less stamina.

Full Set Bonus: Increases all melee damage.
Schinese:
重甲
右步，左步。您可以轻松躲避敌人的攻击并消耗更少的耐力。

全套奖励：增加所有近战伤害。

English: You are invincible in close combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 你在近战中是无敌的。\n\n近战伤害增加 {cvar(.armorRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: Even with an incomplete Raider set, you are unbeatable in melee combat.\n\nMelee damage increased by {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%
Schinese: 即使没有完整的掠夺者套装，您在近战中也是无与伦比的。\n\n近战伤害增加 {cvar(.armorSemiRaiderFSBDisplay:0)}%

English: You are moving through dangerous terrain
Schinese: 您正在穿越危险的地形

English:
With so much trash underfoot, you'd better watch where you step.

Your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], and your stamina consumption while running is increased by [DECEA3]50%[-]

Warning: When running on dangerous surfaces, you have a [DECEA3]25%[-] chance to puncture your foot

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Sole Guard»[-] modification to improve your mobility[-]

脚下有这么多垃圾，你最好注意脚下的位置。

你的移动速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，你的跳跃高度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，跑步时你的体力消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]

警告：在危险表面跑步时，你有一个[DECEA3]25%[-]刺破脚的几率

[DECEA3]你需要装备《鞋底防护》[-]改装来提高你的机动性[-]

English: You are moving through dangerous terrain (PROTECTION)
Schinese: 您正在穿越危险地形（保护）

English: With so much trash underfoot, it's best to keep your eyes peeled.\n\nEven with protection, your movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-]
Schinese: 脚下有这么多垃圾，最好擦亮眼睛。\n\n即使有保护，你的移动速度也会降低[DECEA3]15%[-]

English: You stepped on something sharp and punctured your foot. The wound is not fatal, but it is extremely unpleasant.\n\nYour movement speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-]
Schinese: 你踩到了尖锐的东西，刺伤了你的脚。伤口虽不致命，但却极其难受。\n\n您的移动速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]

English: You are moving through deep snow

Moving through deep snow is not easy, and running is even more so. 

Your walking speed is reduced by [DECEA3]25%[-], running speed by [DECEA3]50%[-], jump height by [DECEA3]25%[-], and stamina consumption when jumping is increased by [DECEA3]25%[-]

在深雪中行走并不容易，跑步更是如此。

步行速度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，跑步速度降低[DECEA3]50%[-]，跳跃高度降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，跳跃时体力消耗增加[DECEA3]25%[-]

English:
It's not easy to move around on uneven ground, let alone run.

在不平坦的地面上移动都不容易，更不用说跑步了。

您的移动速度降低了[DECEA3]15%[-]

Moving around on desert ground isn't easy, let alone running.

[DECEA3]You need to equip the «Wide Sole»[-] modification to increase your mobility[-]

在沙漠地面上移动并不容易，更不用说跑步了。

English: Gravel makes walking easier and safer.\n\nYour mobility is increased by [DECEA3]5%[-]
Schinese: 碎石让行走变得更轻松、更安全。\n\n您的流动性增加了[DECEA3]5%[-]

English: Walking on smooth concrete is a pleasure.\n\nYour mobility is increased by [DECEA3]10%[-]
Schinese: 行走在光滑的混凝土上是一种享受。\n\n您的流动性增加了[DECEA3]10%[-]

Schinese: 良好的柏油路不仅在您使用车辆时很重要。\n\n您的流动性增加了[DECEA3]25%[-]

English: Moving through deep snow is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility in snowy terrain.
Schinese: 穿过厚厚的积雪不再是问题。它显着提高了您在雪地中的机动性。

English: Moving across shifting sand is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility on sand and desert ground.
Schinese: 穿越流沙不再是问题。它显着提高了您在沙地和沙漠地面上的机动性。

English: Moving across dangerous surfaces is no longer a problem. It significantly increases your mobility on dangerous terrain and fully protects you from punctures.
Schinese: 穿越危险表面不再是问题。它显着提高您在危险地形上的机动性，并充分保护您免受刺穿。

English: You have got rid of allergies
You have developed your hand motor skills
Schinese: 您已经发展了手部运动技能

English: You are less afraid of the dark
You are less afraid of animals
You are less afraid of zombies
You are less afraid of fire
You are less afraid of pain
You are less prone to stress
You survive better in the wasteland
Schinese: 你在荒地里生存得更好

English: You are better at handling transport
You work better in a team
Schinese: 你在团队中工作得更好
使用轻型近战武器杀人

English: Spend more time in the forest
Schinese: 花更多的时间在森林里

English: Spend more time in dangerous biomes
Schinese: 在危险的生物群落中花费更多时间
杀死更具攻击性的动物

English: Spend more time by the fire
Spend more time as a team
Schinese: 花更多时间作为一个团队

English: Get behind the wheel more often

Contains items used to start and cancel the [E092FF]Yautja[-] Challenge. This challenge significantly increases gameplay difficulty, so think twice before activating it. All character progression will be reset when it starts. BE CAREFUL! READ THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS BEFORE ACTIVATION!
Schinese: 包含用于启动和取消[E092FF]Yautja[-]挑战的项目。此挑战显着增加了游戏难度，因此在激活它之前请三思。开始时所有角色进度都会重置。当心！激活前请阅读条款和条件！

English:
«You have a chance to prove that even the weakest can survive, but it will require far more effort.
Think twice before starting: once the challenge is activated, there is no turning back. All positive personal traits will be reset, and all negative ones will be raised to level 3.
Your task is to survive and reach the maximum level. Your experience and perseverance are your only allies. Good luck in your suffering!»
[DECEA3]- Black Rabbit[-]
Schinese:
“你有机会证明即使是最弱的人也能生存，但这需要更多的努力。
开始前请三思：挑战一旦启动，就没有回头路。所有积极的个人特质都将被重置，所有消极的个人特质将提升至 3 级。
你的任务是生存并达到最高等级。你的经验和毅力是你唯一的盟友。祝你在苦难中好运！”
[DECEA3]-黑兔[-]

English: Cancels the seasonal challenge and allows you to redistribute your personal traits. However, canceling the challenge does not restore the progression that was reset when it was activated.
Schinese: 取消季节性挑战，让你重新分配你的个人特质。然而，取消挑战并不会恢复激活时重置的进度。
您取消了 Yautja 挑战

English: You have activated the Yautja challenge
Schinese: 您已激活 Yautja 挑战

English: You've activated the [E092FF]Yautja[-] challenge, and now a brutal journey of survival in extreme conditions awaits you. Complete it and prove that you are the strongest in the wasteland.
Schinese: 您已激活[E092FF]Yautja[-]挑战，现在，在极端条件下残酷的生存之旅正在等待着您。完成它并证明你是废土最强的。

English: «You have a chance to prove that even the weakest can survive, but it will require significantly more effort. Think twice before you begin: once the challenge is activated, there is no turning back. All positive personal traits will be reset, and all negative ones will be raised to level 3. Your goal is to survive and reach the maximum level. Your experience and perseverance are your only allies. Good luck in your suffering!» [DECEA3]- Black Rabbit[-]\n\n[FF0000]WARNING! Activating the challenge resets all current character progression. While the challenge is active, personal trait reset items do not work.[-]
Schinese: “你有机会证明即使是最弱的人也能生存，但这需要更多的努力。开始之前请三思：挑战一旦启动，就没有回头路。所有积极的个人特质将被重置，所有消极的个人特质将提升至 3 级。你的目标是生存并达到最高等级。你的经验和毅力是你唯一的盟友。祝你在苦难中好运！”[DECEA3]-黑兔[-]\n\n[FF0000]警告！激活挑战会重置所有当前角色进度。当挑战正在进行时，个人特质重置项目不起作用。[-]
激活[E092FF] 季节性挑战[-] Yautja？

English: [FF0000]WARNING! Activating the challenge resets all current character progression and sets all negative traits to level 3.\nCanceling the challenge does not restore progression. While the challenge is active, personal trait reset items do not work.[-]

English: Activating this item resets the character's personal traits and generates them again.\n\nCharacter generation automatically assigns [DECEA3]4-8[-] positive trait points and [DECEA3]6-14[-] negative trait points. Be careful when resetting. There is no guarantee that each new result will be better than the previous one.

English: No skill points are required here. The character's personal traits are generated after using the «Reset Self Traits book». During the game, you can improve positive traits or get rid of negative ones.

English: [FFB800]Reading[-] books, magazines, or recipes reduces the counter by [DECEA3]1[-].
Schinese: [FFB800]阅读[-]书籍、杂志或食谱将计数器减少[DECEA3]1[-]。

English: You have mild dementia. All experience you gain is reduced by [DECEA3]10%.[-]\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.BooksReadWorse1:0)}[-]
Schinese: 您患有轻度痴呆症。您获得的所有经验都会减少[DECEA3]10%。[-]\n\n[FFB800]剩余：{cvar(.BooksReadWorse1:0)}[-]

English: Fullness should be in moderation. It is extremely difficult to survive if excess weight interferes with movement.
Schinese: 饱足应适度。如果体重过重妨碍了活动，生存就极其困难。

English: You are moderately overweight. While digesting food, your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]7.5%[-] and stamina consumption is increased by [DECEA3]15%[-]. Also, your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]10%[-] and the rate at which your food supply is consumed during physical activity is increased.\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerObesity1:0)}[-]
Schinese: 您中度超重。消化食物时，你的移动能力降低[DECEA3]7.5%[-]，体力消耗增加[DECEA3]15%[-]。此外，您的跳跃高度会降低[DECEA3]10%[-]，并且身体活动期间食物消耗的速度会增加。\n\n[FFB800]剩余：{cvar(.TimerObesity1:0)}[-]

English: You are fat. While digesting food, your mobility is reduced by [DECEA3]15%[-] and stamina consumption is increased by [DECEA3]30%[-]. Also, your jump height is reduced by [DECEA3]20%[-] and the rate at which your food supply is consumed during physical activity is increased.\n\n[FFB800]Remaining: {cvar(.TimerObesity2:0)}[-]
Schinese: 你很胖。消化食物时，你的活动能力降低[DECEA3]15%[-]，体力消耗增加[DECEA3]30%[-]。此外，您的跳跃高度会降低[DECEA3]20%[-]，并且体力活动期间食物消耗的速度会增加。\n\n[FFB800]剩余：{cvar(.TimerObesity2:0)}[-]

Schinese: 你真是个胖子。消化食物时，你的活动能力降低[DECEA3]25%[-]，体力消耗增加[DECEA3]50%[-]。此外，您的跳跃高度会降低[DECEA3]30%[-]，并且体力活动期间食物消耗的速度会增加。\n\n[FFB800]剩余：{cvar(.TimerObesity3:0)}[-]

English: [FFB800]Every second[-] while the food consumption effect is active, the counter decreases by [DECEA3]1[-] It decreases by [DECEA3]2[-] if the character is resting on a comfortable bed at that moment, and by [DECEA3]4[-] during strength training.
Schinese: [FFB800] 当食物消耗效果激活时，每秒[-]计数器会减少[DECEA3]1[-]如果角色此时正躺在舒适的床上，则减少[DECEA3]2[-]，而在力量训练期间则减少[DECEA3]4[-]。

English: [FFB800]Every second[-] you decrease the counter by [DECEA3]1[-] if there are more than 7 zombies around you. The counter decreases [DECEA3]4 times[-] faster if you haven't taken damage for [DECEA3]15[-] seconds.

English:
[FF6666]Better than Just Pipes, Melee[-]

[DECEA3]Warning! Canceling this quest will break the entire quest chain. It can only be restarted with the help of an administrator.[-]

[DECEA3]警告！取消这个任务将会破坏整个任务链。它只能在管理员的帮助下重新启动。[-]

English: Damn it! You managed to kill all these creatures. The Wild One said that you would come for the reward, but I never believed that you would succeed. In general, choose what you like from this... And get lost quickly.
Schinese: 该死的！你成功杀死了所有这些生物。野人说你会来领取奖励，但我从来不相信你会成功。一般来说，从中选择你喜欢的......然后很快迷路。

English: It's hard for me to imagine how you managed to survive all of this. In any case, people like you leave hope that we will all survive. The Wild One said that you would come for the reward, but I never believed that you would succeed. In general, I hope you will not let anyone hurt us.
Schinese: 我很难想象你是如何熬过这一切的。无论如何，像你这样的人离开时希望我们都能活下来。野人说你会来领取奖励，但我从来不相信你会成功。总的来说，我希望你不要让任何人伤害我们。

English: [DECEA3]Better than Just Pipes, Melee[-]\n\n«A good stick can sometimes scare off intruders, especially if it's made of iron. Kill [FF6666]75 zombies[-], and I'll tell you how to get a starting melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: [DECEA3]比管道更好，近战[-]\n\n«一根好的棍子有时可以吓跑入侵者，特别是如果它是铁制的。杀死[FF6666]75 僵尸[-]，我会告诉你如何获得起始近战武器。»[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Light melee weapons may not be the easiest way to stop hordes of crazed zombies, but for single-target combat, they're the best option without the significant stamina drain. A good choice, but certainly not for everyone. Kill [FF6666]50 zombies using any light weapon (knuckles, knives, or batons)[-], and you'll be able to pick up the light [DECEA3]iron[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «轻型近战武器可能不是阻止成群的疯狂僵尸的最简单方法，但对于单目标战斗，它们是最好的选择，而且不会显着消耗体力。一个不错的选择，但肯定不适合所有人。使用任何轻型武器（指节、刀或警棍）[-]杀死[FF6666]50 僵尸，你将能够拿起轻型[DECEA3]iron[-]近战武器。[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Any heavy melee weapon looks menacing, and not just for humans. It can easily stop hordes of bloodthirsty ghouls, but it also requires a fair amount of stamina. A good choice, but certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]50 zombies using any heavy weapon (spears, clubs, or sledgehammers)[-], and you can pick up a heavy [DECEA3]iron[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: “任何重型近战武器看起来都很有威胁，而且不仅仅是对人类而言。它可以轻松阻止成群的嗜血食尸鬼，但也需要相当的耐力。一个不错的选择，但肯定是后天的品味。使用任何重型武器（矛、棍棒或大锤）[-]杀死[FF6666]50 只僵尸，然后你可以拿起重型[DECEA3]iron[-]近战武器。[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: [DECEA3]Better than Just Pipes, Ranged[-]\n\n«Before the infection, many kept long-range weapons, but as you can see, it did not help everyone. I hope it will help you more. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies[-], and you can take a long-range weapon for self-defense.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: [DECEA3]比只是管道更好，远程[-]\n\n«在感染之前，许多人保留了远程武器，但正如你所看到的，它并没有帮助每个人。我希望它能帮助你更多。击杀[FF6666]100只僵尸[-]，即可携带远程武器进行自卫。”[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: [DECEA3]Almost like in a store, Melee[-]\n\n«You can still find quality steel weapons in collectors' houses. They don't need them anymore, but you might find them useful. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies[-] with any melee weapon, and I'll tell you how to get a steel melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: [DECEA3]几乎就像在商店里一样，近战[-]\n\n«您仍然可以在收藏家中找到优质的钢制武器。他们不再需要它们，但您可能会发现它们很有用。用任意近战武器杀死[FF6666]150 只僵尸[-]，我会告诉你如何获得钢制近战武器。»[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Light melee weapons may not be the easiest way to stop hordes of crazed zombies, but for single-target combat, they're the best option without the significant stamina drain. A good choice, but certainly not for everyone. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies using any light weapon (knuckles, knives, or batons)[-], and you'll be able to pick up the light [DECEA3]steel[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «轻型近战武器可能不是阻止成群的疯狂僵尸的最简单方法，但对于单目标战斗，它们是最好的选择，而且不会显着消耗体力。一个不错的选择，但肯定不适合所有人。使用任何轻型武器（指节、刀或警棍）[-]杀死[FF6666]100 只僵尸，你将能够拿起轻型[DECEA3]steel[-]近战武器。[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «Any heavy melee weapon looks menacing, and not just for humans. It can easily stop hordes of bloodthirsty ghouls, but it also requires a fair amount of stamina. A good choice, but certainly an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]100 zombies using any heavy weapon (spears, clubs, or sledgehammers)[-], and you can pick up a heavy [DECEA3]steel[-] melee weapon.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: “任何重型近战武器看起来都很有威胁，而且不仅仅是对人类而言。它可以轻松阻止成群的嗜血食尸鬼，但也需要相当的耐力。一个不错的选择，但肯定是后天的品味。使用任何重型武器（矛、棍棒或大锤）[-]杀死[FF6666]100 个僵尸，然后您可以拿起重型[DECEA3]steel[-]近战武器。»[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: [DECEA3]Almost like in the store, Ranged[-]\n\n«You can still find quality weapons in gun shops. Kill [FF6666]250 zombies[-], and I'll tell you how to get quality ranged weapons.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: [DECEA3]几乎就像在商店里一样，远程[-]\n\n«您仍然可以在枪支商店中找到优质武器。杀死[FF6666]250 只僵尸[-]，我会告诉你如何获得优质远程武器。»[DECEA3]- 野生[-]

English: «So, a Rifle. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any rifles except assault rifles[-], and you'll get a Lever Action rifle and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «那么，一把步枪。一个合理的选择，尽管当然是后天的品味。使用除突击步枪[-]之外的任何步枪杀死[FF6666]150僵尸，你将获得一支杠杆式步枪和我的一份不错的奖励。[DECEA3]-Wild[-]

English: «So, a Shotgun. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any shotguns[-], and you'll get a Pump Shotgun and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese: «所以，一把霰弹枪。一个合理的选择，尽管当然是后天的品味。使用任何霰弹枪[-]杀死[FF6666]150 只僵尸，你会得到一把泵式霰弹枪和我的一份不错的奖励。»[DECEA3]-Wild[-]

English: «So, Automatic weapons. A reasonable choice, although of course an acquired taste. Kill [FF6666]150 zombies using any automatic weapons[-], and you'll get a Tactical Assault Rifle and a nice bonus from me.» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
