English: Inspect the wound and remove the bone
Inspect the wound and remove the bone

[FF6666]Chapter 1. Self-healing[-]
You woke up and found a piece of paper with a message next to you. You don't remember who left it or when. Here's the first part of the message:

«If you woke up and are reading this, then you're not that easy to kill. I found you yesterday before sunset, but there was no way to help. Judging by the external object sticking out of your leg, I wasn't sure you'd survive until morning. But if you were able to, I left a couple of bandages next to you if you try to get that thing out...» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese:
[FF6666]第 1 章. 自我修复[-]
您醒来后发现旁边有一张纸，上面有一条消息。您不记得是谁或何时留下的。这是消息的第一部分：

«如果你醒来并正在阅读本文，那么你就没有那么容易被杀死。我昨天日落前找到了你，但没有办法帮助你。从你腿上伸出的外部物体来看，我不确定你能活到早上。但如果你能的话，我在你旁边留了几条绷带，如果你想把那东西拿出来的话……》[DECEA3]- Wild[-]

English: Look around and kill the offender
Look around and kill the offender

[FF6666]Chapter 2. The Offender[-]
Here's the second part of the message:

«When I was examining you, I heard some movement nearby, I'm not sure that this creature will abandon its prey. However, it apparently doesn't have the strength to attack. In any case, you have some time to recover. Try to patch yourself up before looking for her...» [DECEA3]- Wild[-]
Schinese:
[FF6666]C第二章. 罪犯[-]
这是消息的第二部分：

«当我检查你时，我听到附近有动静，我不确定这个生物会放弃它的猎物。不过，它显然没有攻击的实力。无论如何，你都有一些时间来恢复。在寻找她之前尝试先修补一下自己......»[DECEA3]- Wild[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 1. Hut[-]

«If you want to survive here, you'll need a roof over your head. I'm not sure you have any experience in construction, but right now we need everyone who doesn't bite. I think I can help you.
Build yourself a new wooden home and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up a new tool for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Schinese:
[FF7E2F]第 1 章。小屋[-]

«如果你想在这里生存，你需要一个栖身之所。我不确定你有没有建筑方面的经验，但现在我们需要每个不咬人的人。我想我可以帮助你。
为自己建造一个新的木屋并来找我。我会归还一些资源并挑选一个新的建造工具。”[DECEA3]-达芬奇[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 2. Strong walls[-]

«You have potential as a builder. A wooden house is good, but stronger creatures can easily deal with it. I think it's time to improve your home.
Improve your walls with cobblestones, and strengthen your doors with iron, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up a new tool and equipment for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Schinese:
[FF7E2F]第 2 章. 坚固的城墙[-]

«您有成为建造者的潜力。木屋虽好，但实力更强的生物也能轻松应对。我想是时候改善一下你的家了。
用鹅卵石改善你的墙壁，用铁加固你的门，然后来找我。我将归还一些资源并购买新的施工工具和设备。”[DECEA3]-达芬奇[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 3. Bunker[-]

«Now that's a different matter. Now you can create a real bunker. Concrete walls are much stronger than stone ones and it's time to use them.
Improve your walls with concrete, and strengthen your doors with steel, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and pick up new tools and equipment for construction.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Schinese:
[FF7E2F]第 3 章。地堡[-]

«现在情况不同了。现在您可以创建一个真正的掩体。混凝土墙比石头墙坚固得多，是时候使用它们了。
用混凝土改善你的墙壁，用钢材加固你的门，来找我吧。我将归还一些资源并获取新的施工工具和设备。»[DECEA3]-达芬奇[-]

English:
[FF7E2F]Chapter 4. Bomb shelter[-]

«Well, in such a house you won't be afraid of anything... except the horde, of course. It's time to use more durable materials. In addition to durability, steel is an excellent protection against explosions.
Upgrade your walls with steel and install electric doors and hatches, and come to me. I'll return some of the resources and select the best tool and equipment for construction.
After the upgrade, you can stock up on popcorn and watch any hordes from the roof.» [DECEA3]- da Vinci[-]
Schinese:
[FF7E2F]第 4 章。防空洞[-]

«好吧，在这样的房子里你不会害怕任何东西......当然，除了部落。是时候使用更耐用的材料了。除了耐用性之外，钢材还可以提供出色的防爆保护。
用钢升级你的墙壁并安装电动门和舱口，然后来找我。我会归还一些资源，并选择最好的工具和设备进行建造。
升级后，您可以储备爆米花并在屋顶上观看成群的人群。»[DECEA3]-达芬奇[-]

English: Quest to find a supply cache from surviving settlers\n\n[DECEA3]Warning! This quest may be deadly. Prepare thoroughly before attempting it.[-]
Schinese: 寻求从幸存的定居者那里找到补给箱\n\n[DECEA3]警告！这个任务可能是致命的。尝试前请做好充分准备。[-]

English: Fulfil the conditions of the quest
Set up communication with the outside world

By the way, while you were gone I remembered something...
Recently, one of our scouts went to check a supply cache nearby and never came back. They say there was an infected beast running around nearby, or a dog, or a wolf, who knows. But we didn't check ourselves, as you can see there weren't many people anyway. In any case, if you're going that way, check it out, you might need the supplies yourself, but we don't need these creatures so close.
But I'll tell you right away that it's better to stock up on weapons and stakes - the more the better! These creatures have either eaten or maimed a lot of good guys. But the risk is worth it.

[DECEA3]Attention, a difficult task for the initial stage of the game. Be careful![-]
Schinese:
顺便说一句，当你离开时，我想起了一件事……
最近，我们的一名侦察兵去检查附近的补给储藏室，但再也没有回来。他们说附近有一只受感染的野兽在跑来跑去，或者是一只狗，或者是一只狼，谁知道呢。但我们没有去检查，你可以看到，反正人也不多。无论如何，如果你要走那条路，检查一下，你自己可能需要补给，但我们不需要这些生物离得那么近。
但我会立即告诉你，最好储备武器和木桩 - 越多越好！这些生物要么吃掉要么残害了很多好人。但这个风险是值得的。

[DECEA3]注意，游戏初始阶段的一项艰巨任务。小心！ZXPTOKEN1Q

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 1. Communication with the Outside World[-]

«Greetings, survivor. The settlers reported that you somehow managed to survive. That's great, extra hands wouldn't hurt, and even more so, extra heads. For now, settle in here and try to survive. Once you figure out what's what, it would be nice to establish communication.
I don't like playing with a broken phone, and it's much easier to communicate with a smart stalker directly. In general, figure out how to create a Radio Station and install it. When everything is ready, you can find out my frequency from any merchant. Contact me and I'll tell you how we can help each other.
And yes... nice to meet you» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 1 章. 与外界的通信[-]

«您好，幸存者。定居者报告说你设法活了下来。太好了，多出双手不会有什么坏处，更何况多出一颗头。现在，先在这里定居并努力生存。一旦你弄清楚是什么，建立沟通就会很好。
我不喜欢玩坏手机，直接和智能跟踪者交流要容易得多。一般来说，弄清楚如何创建一个广播电台并安装它。一切准备就绪后，你就可以从任意商家那里查到我的频率。联系我，我会告诉您我们如何互相帮助。
是的...很高兴见到你»[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

我不喜欢玩坏手机，直接和智能跟踪者交流要容易得多。一般来说，弄清楚如何创建一个广播电台并安装它。一切准备就绪后，你就可以从任意商家那里查到我的频率。联系我，我会告诉您我们如何互相帮助。
是的...很高兴见到你»[DECEA3]- Adel

警告！取消这个任务将会破坏整个任务链。只有在管理员的帮助下才能重新启动。[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 2. Communication with the Outside World[-]

«I'm glad you've managed to get used to it and not 'lose' your head, not everyone can do that. We'll organize support for those who still remain in the Quarantine Zone. Not as often as we'd like, but still. If you help us, we'll help you. Collect 10 boxes of resources to support other settlements, and we'll send you valuable alloys. I'm sure you won't be able to create such materials on your own. But they may be useful to you for upgrades or creating something worthwhile.
When you're ready, use the Radio Station to send the support package and receive a small case of experimental alloys.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 2 章. 与外界的沟通[-]

«我很高兴您已经习惯了，并且没有“失去”理智，不是每个人都能做到这一点。我们将为那些仍留在隔离区的人提供支持。虽然不像我们希望的那么频繁，但仍然如此。如果你帮助我们，我们就会帮助你。收集 10 箱资源来支持其他定居点，我们将向您发送有价值的合金。我确信您无法自己创建此类材料。但它们可能对您升级或创造有价值的东西有用。
准备好后，使用广播电台发送支持包并收到一小箱实验合金。»[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 3. Quality tool[-]

«Colleagues reported that the exchange of goods went without incident. I also sent you an upgrade scheme for your tool. We will both need it. Don't waste the alloys we sent you yet. They will come in handy for creating the modification. If you need more for your projects, just collect support boxes and exchange them for the amount you need. We can always find a use for your resources.
Now let's get down to business. Use the scheme I sent you and create the modification. These blades need to be installed on the weapon you use to butcher animals. I hope you learned to hunt?» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 3 章. 质量工具[-]

«同事报告称，货物交换顺利进行。我还向您发送了您的工具的升级方案。我们都需要它。不要浪费我们寄给你的合金。它们将在创建修改时派上用场。如果您的项目需要更多，只需收集支持箱并将其兑换成您需要的数量即可。我们总能找到您的资源的用途。
现在我们开始谈正事吧。使用我发送给您的方案并创建修改。这些刀片需要安装在您用来屠宰动物的武器上。我希望你学会了打猎？”[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 4. The hunt has just begun[-]\n\n«Great, now we have everything we need to start collecting samples. Our scientists are constantly researching the virus that brought us all here. But there are few ordinary infected. As far as I know, the virus has mutated significantly after hitting the cities. But the zombies have only become much stronger. If we learn to kill these creatures without using a tactical charge, it can greatly help us in our research. Kill radioactive and elite zombies and collect mutation samples from them. I don't think you can get samples with a regular knife, so use a tool with a surgical blade. Yes, it's disgusting, but there is no other way out. Be careful with the samples, the virus is not critically active there, but there is radiation. It's better not to keep them in your equipment, use transport or a drone.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese: [FFB800]第 4 章。狩猎才刚刚开始[-]\n\n«太棒了，现在我们已经拥有开始收集样本所需的一切。我们的科学家正在不断研究将我们带到这里的病毒。但普通感染者很少。据我了解，病毒进入城市后已发生明显变异。但僵尸只会变得更加强大。如果我们学会在不使用战术冲锋的情况下杀死这些生物，它可以极大地帮助我们的研究。杀死放射性僵尸和精英僵尸并从中收集变异样本。我认为您无法使用普通刀获取样本，因此请使用带有手术刀片的工具。是的，这很恶心，但没有其他出路。小心样本，那里的病毒并不活跃，但有辐射。最好不要将它们放在您的设备中，使用运输工具或无人机。”[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

[FFB800]Chapter 5. Best Ammo[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 6. A wasteland is a wasteland[-]

«You turned out to be a really tough nut to crack. The headquarters even thinks you're immortal. In any case, no one has ever managed to reduce the population of these creatures to such an extent.
I suggest you go into the wasteland and see what's going on there. I'll warn you right away, it's not an easy walk. The average level of radiation exposure is recorded there, and at night or during rain it rises even higher.
You can't do without good protection there. Try to find Nomad equipment, it will increase your chances of survival.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 6 章。荒地就是荒地[-]

«你真是个难啃的骨头。总部甚至认为你是不朽的。无论如何，没有人能够将这些生物的数量减少到如此程度。
我建议你去荒地看看那里发生了什么。我会立即警告你，这不是一件容易的事。那里记录了辐射暴露的平均水平，在夜间或下雨期间，辐射暴露水平甚至更高。
那里没有良好的保护是不可能的。尝试找到Nomad装备，它将增加你的生存机会。»[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 7. There's No Such Thing as Too Much Protection[-]

«Great, now you have good equipment. But the radiation in those parts is really deadly.
You need to find or create radiation shields. They provide much stronger protection. In addition, I heard that the Zone has learned to create the medication Anti-Rad, which is also an indispensable thing if you want to survive. Anyway, when you get all this, contact me, I'll tell you what to do next.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 7 章. 保护不嫌多[-]

«太棒了，现在您拥有了很好的设备。但那些部位的辐射确实是致命的。
您需要找到或创建辐射防护罩。它们提供更强大的保护。另外，听说Zone已经学会了制造抗辐射药物，想要活下去，这也是必不可少的东西。不管怎样，当你得到这一切后，请联系我，我会告诉你下一步该怎么做。”[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 8. Bad Pets[-]\n\n«I'll get straight to the point. We've been receiving reports from various parts of the Zone that huge mutated animals have started appearing at night. I think it's time for you to start hunting them. I'm sure you'll be able to collect many more samples from these creatures. From reports of encounters with such pets, we know that they don't travel alone. Prepare well before you go looking for them.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese: [FFB800]第 8 章. 坏宠物[-]\n\n«我会开门见山。我们已经收到来自该区域各个地区的报告，称巨大的变异动物开始在夜间出现。我想你是时候开始狩猎它们了。我相信您将能够从这些生物身上收集更多样本。从与此类宠物相遇的报告中，我们知道它们不会单独旅行。在寻找他们之前请做好充分准备。”[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English:
[FFB800]Chapter 9. Big Ones[-]

«I think you're ready to go now. ...Take some matches, a mug and a flashlight (Joke)
So, as we know, the increased radiation level caused an abnormal mutation of everyone who lives there. It's an extremely dangerous idea to climb there at night, but most of the unexplored anomalies appear there at night.
You need to kill and collect samples from three anomalies known to us. Everything you find there is yours. I'm sure there is something to profit from, considering that most of the survivors in the zone avoid this territory.
I really hope for your abilities.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]
Schinese:
[FFB800]第 9 章. 大人物[-]

«我想您现在已经准备好了。 ...带一些火柴、一个杯子和一个手电筒（笑话）
因此，正如我们所知，辐射水平的增加导致了居住在那里的每个人的异常突变。晚上爬到那里是一个极其危险的想法，但大多数未探索的异常现象都是在晚上出现的。
您需要杀死我们已知的三个异常并收集样本。你在那里找到的一切都是你的。考虑到该地区的大多数幸存者都避开了这片领土，我确信有一些可以从中获利的东西。
我真的希望你有能力。»[DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English: [FFB800]Chapter 10. Big threat[-]\n\n«You are simply a hero. How you managed to survive after all this, for me personally, remains a mystery. In any case, your merits are undeniable and very soon we will be able to secure the Quarantine Zone as much as possible. Of course, clearing the entire zone requires a lot of time and effort. But now there is one last task for you. We are hearing rumors about the appearance of huge creatures - Carriers. Kill one of them and we will be able to understand a lot about what is happening with the virus now.» [DECEA3]- Adel[-]

English: The anti-radiation medication is affecting you

The medication worked well when it all started.

Irradiation accumulation rate reduced by [DECEA3]50%[-]

English: When everything was just beginning, this medication performed excellently. It saved many lives of those unfortunate people who managed to survive the explosions. Perhaps in vain.

English: You are protected from light radiation
Not the best — but better than nothing.\n\nProtects against exposure to weak radiation.
Schinese: 不是最好的——但总比没有好。\n\n防止暴露于弱辐射。

English: You are protected from average levels of radiation
Schinese: 您受到保护，免受平均水平的辐射

English: Now you can see what’s out there in the wasteland. The main thing is not to die from those who are there.\n\nProtects against exposure to medium levels of radiation.
Schinese: 现在你可以看到荒地里有什么了。最重要的是不要死于那里的人。\n\n防止暴露于中等水平的辐射。

English: You are protected from high levels of radiation
Schinese: 您可以免受高水平辐射的影响

English: Now you are not afraid of any radiation.\n\nProtects against exposure to high levels of radiation.
Schinese: 现在你不再害怕任何辐射了。\n\n防止暴露于高水平辐射。

English: You are exposed to weak radiation
Schinese: 您暴露在微弱的辐射下

English:
You are exposed to weak radiation. Nothing serious, but be careful - it can kill.
You also lose [FFB800]3 HP[-] every [DECEA3]6 seconds.[-]

You receive radiation that leads to radiation sickness.
Schinese:
您暴露在微弱的辐射下。没什么大不了的，但要小心——它会致命。
您还会每[DECEA3]6 秒失去[FFB800]3 HP[-]。[-]

您受到的辐射会导致放射病。

English: You are exposed to active radiation

You are under the influence of active radiation - try to get away from it.
You also lose [FFB800]3 HP[-] every [DECEA3]3 seconds.[-]

You receive [FFB800]2x[-] more irradiation.
Schinese:
您受到活性辐射的影响 - 尝试远离它。
您每[DECEA3]3 秒也会失去[FFB800]3 HP[-]。[-]

您收到[FFB800]2x[-]更多照射。

English:
This is a critical level of active radiation. If you don't take action, we'll have to say goodbye.
You also lose [FFB800]9 HP[-] every [DECEA3]3 seconds.[-]

You receive [FFB800]5 times[-] more irradiation.
Schinese:
这是活性辐射的临界水平。如果你不采取行动，我们就只能说再见了。
您每[DECEA3]3 秒也会失去[FFB800]9 HP[-]。[-]

您收到[FFB800]5 倍[-]的更多照射。

English:
Radiation sickness is a dangerous thing. In time it will kill you. Thank God it's still in its early stages.
Your health gradually deteriorates, and you [FFB800]lose 10% of your damage resistance.[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]
Schinese:
放射病是一件危险的事情。到时候它就会杀了你。感谢上帝，它仍处于早期阶段。
您的健康状况逐渐恶化，并且您[FFB800] 失去 10% 的伤害抗力。[-]

[DECEA3]只有在没有主动辐射的情况下才有可能恢复。[-]

English: Radiation sickness has developed to the active stage
Schinese: 放射病已发展至活动期

English:
Well, we waited! Radiation sickness has entered the active phase. Now you feel much worse.
You lose [FFB800]30%[-] damage resistance, [FFB800]15%[-] mobility, and your [DECEA3]weapons[-] and [DECEA3]armor[-] break down [FFB800]25%[-] faster. Stamina reduced by [FFB800]50[-], and health by [FFB800]25[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]

好吧，我们等了！放射病已进入活跃期。现在你感觉更糟了。
您失去[FFB800]30%[-]伤害抗性、[FFB800]15%[-]机动性，并且您的[DECEA3]weapons[-]和[DECEA3]armor[-]会更快地分解[FFB800]25%[-]。耐力因[FFB800]50[-]降低，健康因[FFB800]25[-]

[DECEA3]只有在没有主动辐射的情况下才有可能恢复。[-]

English: [FFB800]The level of radiation received is critical[-]

Madame Curie is resting! You have reached a critical level of radiation. Your health is critical and you may die soon.
You lose [FFB800]50%[-] damage resistance, [FFB800]30%[-] mobility, and your [DECEA3]weapons[-] and [DECEA3]armor[-] break down [FFB800]50%[-] faster. Stamina reduced by [FFB800]100[-], and health by [FFB800]50[-]

[DECEA3]Recovery is possible only in the absence of active radiation.[-]
Schinese:
居里夫人休息了！您的辐射已达到临界水平。您的健康至关重要，您可能很快就会死去。
您失去了[FFB800]50%[-]伤害抗性、[FFB800]30%[-]机动性，并且您的[DECEA3]weapons[-]和[DECEA3]armor[-]会更快地分解[FFB800]50%[-]。耐力因[FFB800]100[-]降低，健康因[FFB800]50[-]

[DECEA3]只有在没有主动辐射的情况下才有可能恢复。[-]

English:
The radiation is not strong, so consider yourself lucky.
You still lose [FFB800]10%[-] from damage resistance.

Over time, your body will cope and repair itself. Increasing protection from active radiation will speed up the process. Also, a good shower won't hurt - being in water speeds up recovery.
Schinese: 辐射并不强，所以你应该庆幸。\n你仍然会因伤害抗性而损失[FFB800]10%[-]。随着时间的推移，您的身体会自行应对和修复。加强对主动辐射的防护将加速这一过程。此外，好好洗个澡也没什么坏处——泡在水里可以加速恢复。
活动性放射病 - 康复

English:
You are recovering from a moderate heat stroke. You need to cool down.
Stamina pool is reduced by [FFB800]30[-]
Stamina consumption is increased by [FFB800]20%[-]
Your hands are failing you — weapon spread and recoil are noticeably increased.

Indoors and in water, the recovery rate is significantly increased.
Schinese:
您正在从中度中暑中恢复过来。你需要冷静下来。
体力池减少[FFB800]30[-]
体力消耗增加[FFB800]20%[-]
你的双手让你失望了——武器扩散和后坐力明显增加。

在室内和水中，回收率显着提高。

English: You are recovering from critical heat stroke
Schinese: 您正在从严重中暑中恢复过来

English:
You are recovering from a critical heat stroke. You urgently need to cool down.
Stamina pool is reduced by [FFB800]60[-]
Stamina consumption is increased by [FFB800]40%[-]
Your hands are failing you — weapon spread and recoil are significantly increased.

Indoors and in water, the recovery rate is significantly increased.
Schinese:
您正在从严重中暑中恢复过来。你迫切需要冷静下来。
体力池减少[FFB800]60[-]
体力消耗增加[FFB800]40%[-]
你的双手让你失望了——武器扩散和后坐力显着增加。

在室内和水中，回收率显着提高。

English:
You have mild frostbite. You need to warm up.
Weapon reload speed and melee attack speed are reduced by [FFB800]10%[-]
Mobility is reduced by [FFB800]10%[-]

Indoors and near a campfire, the rate of effect accumulation is reduced.
[DECEA3]Recovery is only possible when there is no freezing.[-]
Schinese:
你有轻度冻伤。你需要热身。
武器装填速度和近战攻击速度降低[FFB800]10%[-]
移动性降低[FFB800]10%[-]

在室内和篝火附近，效果累积率降低。
[DECEA3]只有在没有冻结的情况下才可以恢复。[-]

English: Look intimidating and get a better deal from traders. Also boosts strength!\n\nThe [DECEA3]Better Barter[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 看起来令人生畏，并从交易者那里获得更好的交易。还可以增强力量！\n\n[DECEA3]更好的易货贸易[-]技能可以提高改装的质量。

English: Reload faster.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Armor[-] crafting skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 重装速度更快。\n\n[DECEA3]Armor[-] 制作技能提高了改装的质量。

English: Increases magazine capacity for pump shotguns.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Boomstick[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 增加泵式霰弹枪的弹匣容量。\n\n[DECEA3]Boomstick[-] 技能提高改装质量。

English: This large drum magazine increases the ammo capacity on machine guns, but is a little slower to reload.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Machine Gunner[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 这种大型弹鼓增加了机枪的弹药容量，但装填速度稍慢。\n\n[DECEA3]机枪手[-]技能提高了改装的质量。

English: Increases magazine capacity.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Gunslinger[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 增加弹匣容量。\n\n[DECEA3]Gunslinger[-] 技能提高改装质量。

English: Arrows and Bolts fly quicker and further with this modification.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Archery[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 通过此修改，箭和螺栓飞得更快更远。\n\n[DECEA3]射箭[-] 技能提高了修改的质量。

English: An arrow rest improves the accuracy of a bow.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Archery[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 箭台提高了弓的准确性。\n\n[DECEA3]射箭[-] 技能提高了修改的质量。

English: Temporarily disables the regeneration ability of Radiated, Charged, and Infernal zombies.\n\nThe [DECEA3]The Huntsman[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 暂时禁用辐射、带电和地狱僵尸的再生能力。\n\n[DECEA3]猎人[-]技能开发改造质量。

English: Do more damage to all animals.\n\nThe [DECEA3]The Huntsman[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对所有动物造成更多伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]猎人[-]技能可提高改造的质量。

English: Has a chance to cause a Bleeding Wound on a regular attack.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Deep Cuts[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 普通攻击有几率造成流血伤口。\n\n[DECEA3]深切[-]技能提高改造质量。

English:
Has a chance to cause bleeding damage with primary attacks.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese:
主要攻击有几率造成流血伤害。
可以安装在俱乐部中。

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能开发改造质量。

English:
Each successive hit lowers enemies armor rating.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese:
每次连续打击都会降低敌人的护甲等级。
可以安装在俱乐部中。

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能提高改造质量。

English:
Has a chance to knock down opponents.
Can be installed in clubs.

The [DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese:
有机会击倒对手。
可以安装在俱乐部中。

[DECEA3]Pummel Pete[-]技能培养改装质量。

English:
A modification for all melee weapons and tools.
Adds a chance to stun and slow victims.

Knives and machetes do not have a head that can be weighted.

The [DECEA3]Grand Slam[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese:
对所有近战武器和工具的修改。
增加击晕和减缓受害者的机会。

刀和砍刀没有可以加重的头部。

[DECEA3]大满贯[-]技能开发修改的质量。

English:
A melee item can triple as a light source, set enemies on fire, and used as a source of heat.

Can be installed in melee tools and weapons that have a long shaft or blade.

The [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese:
近战物品可以作为光源的三重，使敌人着火，并用作热源。

可以安装在具有长轴或刀片的近战工具和武器中。

[DECEA3]高级工程[-]技能开发改装质量。

English: This blade modification increases block damage and lowers degradation.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 这种刀片修改增加了方块损坏并降低了退化。\n\n[DECEA3]高级工程[-]技能提高了修改的质量。

English: Does more damage against dirt.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对污垢造成更多伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提高改造质量。

English: Does more damage against stone.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对石头造成更多伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提高改造质量。

English: Does more damage against iron.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对铁造成更多伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提高改造质量。

English: Does more damage against wood.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对木材造成更多伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提高改造质量。

English: Deal more damage to blocks, but less damage to enemies.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 对物块造成更多伤害，但对敌人造成更少伤害。\n\n[DECEA3]Miner 69'er[-] 技能可提高改造质量。

English: Decreases melee stamina usage and increases weapon handling of bows.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 减少近战耐力的使用并增加弓的武器操控性。\n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能提高改装质量。

English: This modification lowers degradation for melee weapons, tools, and bows.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 此修改降低了近战武器、工具和弓的退化。\n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能提高了修改的质量。

English: When below 50% health, regenerate health over time.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 当生命值低于 50% 时，随着时间的推移会恢复生命值。\n\n[DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] 技能可提高改造的质量。

English: Moderately increases tank size for chainsaws and augers.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 适度增加电锯和螺旋钻的水箱尺寸。\n\n[DECEA3]母矿脉[-]技能提高改装质量。

English: Greatly increases tank size for chainsaws and augers.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Mother Lode[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 大大增加了链锯和螺旋钻的水箱尺寸。\n\n[DECEA3]母矿脉[-]技能提高了改造的质量。

English: Any hand tool or bladed weapon degrades slower with this modification.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 通过此修改，任何手动工具或刀片武器的降解速度都会变慢。\n\n[DECEA3]高级工程[-]技能可提高修改的质量。

English: Increase your vehicle's fuel storage with this mod.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Grease Monkey[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 使用此模组增加车辆的燃油储存量。\n\n[DECEA3]油猴[-] 技能可提高改装质量。

English: Vehicles consume less fuel.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Grease Monkey[-] skill develops the quality of modification.
Schinese: 车辆消耗更少的燃料。\n\n[DECEA3]油猴[-]技能培养改装质量。

English: A tool that can be installed in the forge to allow increased airflow and faster smelting speeds.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Schinese: 一种可以安装在锻造厂中以增加气流和更快熔炼速度的工具。\n\n[DECEA3]高级工程[-]技能可提高物品的质量。

English: A tool that can be installed in a forge. It increases the crafting speed of that forge.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Advanced Engineering[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Schinese: 可以安装在锻造厂中的工具。它提高了该锻造厂的制作速度。\n\n[DECEA3]高级工程[-]技能提高了物品的质量。

English: A cooking utensil used in the campfire to unlock recipes.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Master Chef[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Schinese: 在篝火中用于解锁食谱的烹饪器具。\n\n[DECEA3]主厨[-]技能可提高物品的质量。

English: A cooking utensil used in the campfire to unlock recipes.\n\nThe [DECEA3]Master Chef[-] skill develops the quality of item.
Schinese: 在篝火中用于解锁食谱的烹饪器具。\n\n[DECEA3]主厨[-]技能可提高物品的质量。
